DAY 01
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 fix [동] 고치다, 수리하다 I can fix the broken toy. break repair
2 shade [명] 그늘 Let's sit in the shade. sunlight shadow
3 bury [동] 묻다, 매장하다 Dogs like to bury bones. dig up hide
4 dot [명] 점 Put a dot on the paper. line spot
5 through [전] 통과하여 Go through the open door. - across
6 copy [동] 복사하다, 따라하다 Do not copy my homework. original imitate
7 lend [동] 빌려주다 Can you lend me a pencil? borrow give
8 moment [명] 순간, 잠시 Wait for a moment, please. - second
9 wing [명] 날개 The bird has a blue wing. - -
10 machine [명] 기계 This machine makes loud sounds. - tool
11 piece [명] 조각 I want a piece of cake. whole bit
12 twin [명] 쌍둥이 My sister is my twin. - pair
13 war [명] 전쟁 The war finally ended. peace fight
14 advice [명] 충고, 조언 My mom gave me good advice. - tip
15 lead [동] 안내하다, 이끌다 He will lead us to school. follow guide
16 perfect [형] 완벽한 Your drawing is perfect! bad excellent
17 search [동] 찾다 I search for my lost cat. hide look for
18 contest [명] 대회 I won the singing contest. - game
19 display [동] 전시하다 They display the art here. hide show
20 trouble [명] 어려움, 문제 He is in big trouble now. peace problem
21 sharp [형] 날카로운 The knife is very sharp. dull pointy
22 at first 처음에는 At first, I was shy. at last firstly
23 put on 입다, 신다, 쓰다 Put on your warm coat. take off wear
24 find out 알아내다 I want to find out why. hide learn
DAY 01
쓰기 연습Write & Remember
학습한 날짜 :

뜻과 단어를 확인하고, 오른쪽 줄에 영어 단어를 3번 따라 쓰세요. 따라 쓸 때는 반드시 큰 소리로 단어를 읽으세요.

No.단어뜻3번 쓰기
1 wing [명] 날개
2 at first 처음에는
3 search [동] 찾다
4 find out 알아내다
5 put on 입다, 신다, 쓰다
6 display [동] 전시하다
7 through [전] 통과하여
8 lead [동] 안내하다, 이끌다
9 moment [명] 순간, 잠시
10 piece [명] 조각
11 fix [동] 고치다, 수리하다
12 sharp [형] 날카로운
13 dot [명] 점
14 machine [명] 기계
15 perfect [형] 완벽한
16 trouble [명] 어려움, 문제
17 twin [명] 쌍둥이
18 advice [명] 충고, 조언
19 copy [동] 복사하다, 따라하다
20 war [명] 전쟁
21 contest [명] 대회
22 bury [동] 묻다, 매장하다
23 lend [동] 빌려주다
24 shade [명] 그늘
DAY 01
예문 빈칸 채우기Fill in the Blank
학습한 날짜 :

뜻을 참고하여 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 단어 은행에서 골라 쓰세요.

put ontwintroublemachinemomentperfectat firstwingcontestthroughsharpdotpiecesearchfind outadvicefixburycopylendwardisplayleadshade
  1. Go the open door. through ([전] 통과하여)
  2. I want to why. find out (알아내다)
  3. Wait for a , please. moment ([명] 순간, 잠시)
  4. The knife is very . sharp ([형] 날카로운)
  5. The bird has a blue . wing ([명] 날개)
  6. I can the broken toy. fix ([동] 고치다, 수리하다)
  7. , I was shy. at first (처음에는)
  8. your warm coat. put on (입다, 신다, 쓰다)
  9. Your drawing is ! perfect ([형] 완벽한)
  10. Do not my homework. copy ([동] 복사하다, 따라하다)
  11. This makes loud sounds. machine ([명] 기계)
  12. Dogs like to bones. bury ([동] 묻다, 매장하다)
  13. He will us to school. lead ([동] 안내하다, 이끌다)
  14. The finally ended. war ([명] 전쟁)
  15. My sister is my . twin ([명] 쌍둥이)
  16. Let's sit in the . shade ([명] 그늘)
  17. I want a of cake. piece ([명] 조각)
  18. They the art here. display ([동] 전시하다)
  19. Can you me a pencil? lend ([동] 빌려주다)
  20. I for my lost cat. search ([동] 찾다)
  21. I won the singing . contest ([명] 대회)
  22. He is in big now. trouble ([명] 어려움, 문제)
  23. Put a on the paper. dot ([명] 점)
  24. My mom gave me good . advice ([명] 충고, 조언)
DAY 01
반의어 고르기Choose the Antonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. sharp ([형] 날카로운)
    ① dull② at first③ copy④ fix
  2. find out (알아내다)
    ① moment② bury③ war④ hide
  3. shade ([명] 그늘)
    ① at first② sharp③ put on④ sunlight
  4. war ([명] 전쟁)
    ① wing② shade③ peace④ through
  5. display ([동] 전시하다)
    ① fix② hide③ trouble④ search
  6. fix ([동] 고치다, 수리하다)
    ① break② lead③ shade④ advice
  7. dot ([명] 점)
    ① through② line③ machine④ contest
  8. bury ([동] 묻다, 매장하다)
    ① copy② shade③ twin④ dig up
  9. at first (처음에는)
    ① put on② shade③ display④ at last
  10. lend ([동] 빌려주다)
    ① display② advice③ twin④ borrow
  11. copy ([동] 복사하다, 따라하다)
    ① machine② war③ original④ twin
  12. search ([동] 찾다)
    ① hide② contest③ twin④ advice
  13. perfect ([형] 완벽한)
    ① lend② search③ bad④ copy
  14. piece ([명] 조각)
    ① dot② whole③ through④ trouble
  15. lead ([동] 안내하다, 이끌다)
    ① fix② at first③ twin④ follow
  16. trouble ([명] 어려움, 문제)
    ① shade② at first③ peace④ find out
  17. put on (입다, 신다, 쓰다)
    ① copy② machine③ twin④ take off

학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 동의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. find out (알아내다)

  2. lead ([동] 안내하다, 이끌다)
    ① advice② moment③ machine④ guide
  3. sharp ([형] 날카로운)

    ① imitate② war③ find out④ wing
  5. piece ([명] 조각)
    ① find out② twin③ bit④ put on
  6. search ([동] 찾다)
    ① bury② copy③ look for④ sharp
  7. at first (처음에는)
    ① fix② firstly③ search④ lead
  8. display ([동] 전시하다)
    ① find out② show③ fix④ contest
  9. put on (입다, 신다, 쓰다)
    ① perfect② wear③ dot④ moment
  10. bury ([동] 묻다, 매장하다)
    ① through② hide③ piece④ shade
  11. contest ([명] 대회)
    ① perfect② display③ at first④ game
  12. through ([전] 통과하여)
    ① piece② advice③ across④ search
  13. machine ([명] 기계)
    ① piece② display③ lend④ tool
  14. dot ([명] 점)
    ① spot② shade③ advice④ war
  15. advice ([명] 충고, 조언)
    ① display② tip③ lend④ wing
  16. trouble ([명] 어려움, 문제)
    ① problem② bury③ through④ wing
  17. twin ([명] 쌍둥이)
    ① pair② machine③ dot④ piece
  18. lend ([동] 빌려주다)
    ① through② give③ copy④ shade
  19. fix ([동] 고치다, 수리하다)
    ① dot② piece③ advice④ repair
  20. perfect ([형] 완벽한)
    ① lend② contest③ advice④ excellent
  21. moment ([명] 순간, 잠시)
    ① put on② second③ wing④ lend
  22. shade ([명] 그늘)
    ① put on② shadow③ lend④ fix
  23. war ([명] 전쟁)
    ① fight② find out③ put on④ perfect
DAY 02
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 roll 구르다, 굴리다 The ball can roll fast. stay turn
2 exit 출구, 나가다 Find the exit of the room. entrance way out
3 borrow 빌리다 Can I borrow your book? lend take
4 flood 홍수 Heavy rain caused a flood. dry -
5 mix 섞다 Mix the milk and eggs. separate combine
6 stamp 우표, 도장 Put a stamp on the letter. - sticker
7 active 활동적인 He is an active boy. lazy busy
8 dig 파다 Dig a hole to plant. fill -
9 simple 간단한 This math is very simple. hard easy
10 insect 곤충 The bee is an insect. - bug
11 view 경치, 전망 The mountain view is beautiful. - scene
12 root 뿌리 The tree has long roots. top bottom
13 total 전체의, 합계 The total price is $10. part whole
14 final 마지막의 Today is the final day. first last
15 nickname 별명 My nickname is Sunny. - pet name
16 leader 지도자 She is a great leader. follower boss
17 coach 코치, 감독 The coach helps our team. - teacher
18 lift 올리다 I can lift this box. drop raise
19 among ~사이에 He is among his friends. - between
20 award 상 I got a gold award. - prize
21 elder 나이가 더 많은 Respect your elder brother. younger older
22 at last 마침내 At last, we are home. at first finally
23 grow up 자라다, 성장하다 I want to grow up. - -
24 before long 머지않아 Winter comes before long. later soon

19 before long 머지않아
20 borrow 빌리다
21 exit 출구, 나가다
22 root 뿌리
23 roll 구르다, 굴리다
24 among ~사이에

DAY 02
예문 빈칸 채우기Fill in the Blank
학습한 날짜 :

뜻을 참고하여 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 단어 은행에서 골라 쓰세요.

grow upsimplefloodmixstampawardtotalrollelderfinalinsectrootliftbefore longactiveviewat lastleadercoachexitnicknamedigamongborrow
  1. He is his friends. among (~사이에)
  2. The bee is an . insect (곤충)
  3. a hole to plant. dig (파다)
  4. , we are home. at last (마침내)
  5. Today is the day. final (마지막의)
  6. I can this box. lift (올리다)
  7. Find the of the room. exit (출구, 나가다)
  8. The mountain is beautiful. view (경치, 전망)
  9. Put a on the letter. stamp (우표, 도장)
  10. The price is $10. total (전체의, 합계)
  11. Respect your brother. elder (나이가 더 많은)
  12. I want to . grow up (자라다, 성장하다)
  13. This math is very . simple (간단한)
  14. She is a great . leader (지도자)
  15. Can I your book? borrow (빌리다)
  16. My is Sunny. nickname (별명)
  17. the milk and eggs. mix (섞다)
  18. Winter comes . before long (머지않아)
  19. Heavy rain caused a . flood (홍수)
  20. The tree has long s. root (뿌리)
  21. He is an boy. active (활동적인)
  22. I got a gold . award (상)
  23. The ball can fast. roll (구르다, 굴리다)
  24. The helps our team. coach (코치, 감독)

학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

    ① elder② lazy③ total④ view

    ① separate② insect③ view④ root
  3. root (뿌리)
    ① lift② top③ at last④ among

    ① grow up② simple③ lift④ part
  6. borrow (빌리다)

    ① lift② active③ leader④ first
  8. leader (지도자)
    ① roll② nickname③ lift④ follower
  9. elder (나이가 더 많은)
    ① view② younger③ lift④ mix

    ① among② total③ elder④ fill
  11. lift (올리다)
    ① mix② drop③ award④ root

    ① roll② dry③ at last④ coach

    ① total② stay③ elder④ among

    ① exit② dig③ at first④ active

DAY 03
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 pack [동] 짐을 싸다 [명] 갑, 통 I pack my bag for school. unpack fill
2 male [형] 남성의 [명] 남성 The lion is a male animal. female boy
3 finally [부] 마침내, 결국 He finally finished the race. at first at last
4 sometime [부] 언젠가 Let's meet sometime next week. - once
5 valley [명] 계곡, 골짜기 Flowers grow in the valley. mountain low land
6 bark [동] (개가) 짖다 The dog started to bark. - yelp
7 crash [동] 충돌하다 [명] 충돌 Don't crash into the wall. - hit
8 nature [명] 자연 I love walking in nature. - earth
9 harmony [명] 조화, 화합 We live in harmony together. fight peace
10 wonder [동] 궁금하다 [명] 놀라움 I wonder where she is. know think
11 able [형] 할 수 있는 I am able to swim well. unable can
12 pain [명] 통증, 고통 I have pain in my arm. comfort hurt
13 uniform [명] 제복, 유니폼 I wear a school uniform. - -
14 beauty [명] 아름다움, 미 Look at the beauty of flowers. ugly pretty
15 taste [명] 맛 [동] 맛이 나다 The soup has a good taste. - flavor
16 without [전] ~없이 I went out without an umbrella. with no
17 sunlight [명] 햇빛, 햇살 Plants need warm sunlight. dark sun
18 exact [형] 정확한 Give me the exact answer. wrong correct
19 popular [형] 인기 있는 He is a popular singer. - famous
20 noisy [형] 시끄러운 The classroom is very noisy. quiet loud
21 pill [명] 알약 Take one pill after dinner. - medicine
22 be in trouble 어려움에 처하다 Don't be in trouble again. - have problem
23 think up ~을 생각해내다 I think up a new idea. forget make
24 be famous for ~로 유명하다 Korea is famous for kimchi. - well known
DAY 03
쓰기 연습Write & Remember
학습한 날짜 :

뜻과 단어를 확인하고, 오른쪽 줄에 영어 단어를 3번 따라 쓰세요. 따라 쓸 때는 반드시 큰 소리로 단어를 읽으세요.

No.단어뜻3번 쓰기
1 harmony [명] 조화, 화합
2 finally [부] 마침내, 결국
3 be in trouble 어려움에 처하다
4 uniform [명] 제복, 유니폼
5 pack [동] 짐을 싸다 [명] 갑, 통
6 sunlight [명] 햇빛, 햇살
7 beauty [명] 아름다움, 미
8 male [형] 남성의 [명] 남성
9 sometime [부] 언젠가
10 bark [동] (개가) 짖다
11 without [전] ~없이
12 exact [형] 정확한
13 crash [동] 충돌하다 [명] 충돌
14 pill [명] 알약
15 popular [형] 인기 있는
16 able [형] 할 수 있는
17 noisy [형] 시끄러운
18 be famous for ~로 유명하다
19 nature [명] 자연
20 pain [명] 통증, 고통
21 valley [명] 계곡, 골짜기
22 taste [명] 맛 [동] 맛이 나다
23 think up ~을 생각해내다
24 wonder [동] 궁금하다 [명] 놀라움

누적 복습 시험 · DAY 01Review Test
학습한 날짜 :

단어는 뜻을, 뜻은 단어를 쓰세요.

1 put on 입다, 신다, 쓰다
2 [명] 대회 contest
3 display [동] 전시하다
4 처음에는 at first
5 machine [명] 기계
6 [형] 완벽한 perfect
7 wing [명] 날개
8 [동] 묻다, 매장하다 bury
9 [전] 통과하여 through
10 lead [동] 안내하다, 이끌다
11 [명] 점 dot
12 lend [동] 빌려주다
13 moment [명] 순간, 잠시
14 [형] 날카로운 sharp
15 [동] 고치다, 수리하다 fix
16 find out 알아내다
17 [동] 찾다 search
18 [명] 그늘 shade
19 [명] 전쟁 war
20 [명] 어려움, 문제 trouble
21 piece [명] 조각
22 advice [명] 충고, 조언
23 [동] 복사하다, 따라하다 copy
24 twin [명] 쌍둥이
DAY 03

학습한 날짜 :

단어는 뜻을, 뜻은 단어를 쓰세요.

2 view 경치, 전망
3 coach 코치, 감독
4 final 마지막의
5 mix 섞다
6 나이가 더 많은 elder

9 grow up 자라다, 성장하다

11 dig 파다

15 root 뿌리
16 stamp 우표, 도장
17 간단한 simple
18 roll 구르다, 굴리다
19 exit 출구, 나가다
20 award 상
21 before long 머지않아
22 flood 홍수
23 올리다 lift
24 borrow 빌리다
DAY 03
예문 빈칸 채우기Fill in the Blank
학습한 날짜 :

뜻을 참고하여 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 단어 은행에서 골라 쓰세요.

malebe famous forwondernoisyablepopularcrashfinallybeautybarkpackpainvalleythink upbe in troublesometimepillsunlighttasteexactnatureuniformharmonywithout
  1. Let's meet next week. sometime ([부] 언젠가)
  2. We live in together. harmony ([명] 조화, 화합)
  3. Plants need warm . sunlight ([명] 햇빛, 햇살)
  4. Look at the of flowers. beauty ([명] 아름다움, 미)
  5. The classroom is very . noisy ([형] 시끄러운)
  6. Flowers grow in the . valley ([명] 계곡, 골짜기)
  7. The soup has a good . taste ([명] 맛 [동] 맛이 나다)
  8. The dog started to . bark ([동] (개가) 짖다)
  9. I a new idea. think up (~을 생각해내다)
  10. I where she is. wonder ([동] 궁금하다 [명] 놀라움)
  11. I love walking in . nature ([명] 자연)
  12. Don't again. be in trouble (어려움에 처하다)
  13. I wear a school . uniform ([명] 제복, 유니폼)
  14. He is a singer. popular ([형] 인기 있는)
  15. I am to swim well. able ([형] 할 수 있는)
  16. Give me the answer. exact ([형] 정확한)
  17. I have in my arm. pain ([명] 통증, 고통)
  18. The lion is a animal. male ([형] 남성의 [명] 남성)
  19. Take one after dinner. pill ([명] 알약)
  20. I my bag for school. pack ([동] 짐을 싸다 [명] 갑, 통)
  21. He finished the race. finally ([부] 마침내, 결국)
  22. Don't into the wall. crash ([동] 충돌하다 [명] 충돌)
  23. Korea is famous for kimchi. ( ) be famous for (~로 유명하다)
  24. I went out an umbrella. without ([전] ~없이)
DAY 03
반의어 고르기Choose the Antonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. beauty ([명] 아름다움, 미)
    ① ugly② uniform③ pain④ valley
  2. harmony ([명] 조화, 화합)
    ① crash② without③ fight④ valley
  3. think up (~을 생각해내다)
    ① popular② harmony③ forget④ valley
  4. finally ([부] 마침내, 결국)
    ① sometime② pill③ pain④ at first
  5. noisy ([형] 시끄러운)
    ① harmony② wonder③ crash④ quiet
  6. sunlight ([명] 햇빛, 햇살)
    ① dark② be in trouble③ wonder④ pack
  7. without ([전] ~없이)
    ① male② with③ nature④ be in trouble
  8. male ([형] 남성의 [명] 남성)
    ① beauty② female③ harmony④ sunlight
  9. valley ([명] 계곡, 골짜기)
    ① sometime② crash③ finally④ mountain
  10. pain ([명] 통증, 고통)
    ① think up② popular③ comfort④ without
  11. wonder ([동] 궁금하다 [명] 놀라움)
    ① know② be famous for③ taste④ male
  12. able ([형] 할 수 있는)
    ① sometime② be famous for③ exact④ unable
  13. pack ([동] 짐을 싸다 [명] 갑, 통)
    ① popular② without③ unpack④ harmony
  14. exact ([형] 정확한)
    ① sunlight② uniform③ able④ wrong

동의어 고르기Choose the Synonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 동의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. be in trouble (어려움에 처하다)
    ① without② have problem③ finally④ wonder
  2. male ([형] 남성의 [명] 남성)
    ① harmony② boy③ finally④ valley
  3. crash ([동] 충돌하다 [명] 충돌)
    ① harmony② hit③ able④ uniform
  4. valley ([명] 계곡, 골짜기)
    ① low land② uniform③ think up④ crash
  5. popular ([형] 인기 있는)
    ① bark② famous③ noisy④ crash
  6. finally ([부] 마침내, 결국)
    ① pain② popular③ crash④ at last
  7. pack ([동] 짐을 싸다 [명] 갑, 통)
    ① male② uniform③ be famous for④ fill
  8. sunlight ([명] 햇빛, 햇살)
    ① nature② pack③ sun④ be in trouble
  9. bark ([동] (개가) 짖다)
    ① exact② nature③ yelp④ pain
  10. harmony ([명] 조화, 화합)
    ① male② peace③ beauty④ pain
  11. pill ([명] 알약)
    ① popular② medicine③ valley④ sometime
  12. taste ([명] 맛 [동] 맛이 나다)
    ① flavor② wonder③ male④ sometime
  13. without ([전] ~없이)
    ① pack② no③ be famous for④ noisy
  14. pain ([명] 통증, 고통)
    ① noisy② hurt③ crash④ pack
  15. beauty ([명] 아름다움, 미)
    ① sometime② pretty③ pain④ pack
  16. nature ([명] 자연)
    ① finally② earth③ uniform④ think up
  17. able ([형] 할 수 있는)
    ① sunlight② noisy③ wonder④ can
  18. think up (~을 생각해내다)
    ① make② bark③ crash④ be famous for
  19. wonder ([동] 궁금하다 [명] 놀라움)
    ① think② be famous for③ nature④ male
  20. noisy ([형] 시끄러운)
    ① loud② be in trouble③ nature④ male
  21. sometime ([부] 언젠가)
    ① think up② taste③ finally④ once
  22. exact ([형] 정확한)
    ① nature② beauty③ correct④ pill
  23. be famous for (~로 유명하다)
    ① sunlight② pack③ popular④ well known
DAY 04
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 female [형] 여성의 [명] 여성 The queen is a female. male girl
2 regular [형] 정기적인, 보통의 I need regular exercise. special normal
3 coin [명] 동전 I have a shiny coin. bill money
4 prepare [동] 준비하다 Prepare for the math test. - ready
5 quite [부] 꽤, 상당히 The room is quite big. - very
6 alike [형] 비슷한 [부] 비슷하게 The two sisters look alike. different same
7 alarm [명] 경보, 알람 The alarm rang at seven. - bell
8 bored [형] 지루해 하는 I am bored at home. excited tired
9 freeze [동] 얼다, 얼리다 Water will freeze in winter. melt ice
10 language [명] 언어, 말 English is a global language. - speech
11 nobody [대] 아무도 없다 Nobody is in the room. everybody no one
12 teenager [명] 십대 My brother is a teenager. adult youth
13 chance [명] 가능성, 기회 Give me one more chance. - luck
14 curl [동] 곱슬거리다 [명] 곱슬머리 I have a curl in my hair. straight wave
15 planet [명] 행성 Earth is a beautiful planet. - world
16 deaf [형] 귀가 안 들리는 The old man is deaf. - -
17 invent [동] 발명하다 Edison did invent the light. copy make
18 soil [명] 흙, 토양 Plants grow in rich soil. - dirt
19 noodle [명] 국수 I like to eat noodles. - pasta
20 stair [명] 계단 Walk down the stair slowly. - step
21 comedy [명] 코미디, 희극 We watched a funny comedy. tragedy funny
22 calm down 진정하다 Please calm down and talk. get angry relax
23 take care 조심하다 Take care on your way. - be careful
24 because of ~때문에 I stayed because of rain. - due to

21 because of ~때문에
22 quite [부] 꽤, 상당히
23 calm down 진정하다
24 curl [동] 곱슬거리다 [명] 곱슬머리

뜻을 참고하여 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 단어 은행에서 골라 쓰세요.

deafalikecurlquiteprepareinventalarmchancenobodyfemalebecause ofstaircoinlanguageplanetboredfreezesoilnoodlecomedyteenagerregularcalm downtake care
  1. Water will in winter. freeze ([동] 얼다, 얼리다)
  2. The two sisters look . alike ([형] 비슷한 [부] 비슷하게)
  3. I am at home. bored ([형] 지루해 하는)
  4. We watched a funny . comedy ([명] 코미디, 희극)
  5. I like to eat s. noodle ([명] 국수)
  6. I have a shiny . coin ([명] 동전)
  7. The room is big. quite ([부] 꽤, 상당히)
  8. Please and talk. calm down (진정하다)
  9. I have a in my hair. curl ([동] 곱슬거리다 [명] 곱슬머리)
  10. Plants grow in rich . soil ([명] 흙, 토양)
  11. for the math test. prepare ([동] 준비하다)
  12. English is a global . language ([명] 언어, 말)
  13. is in the room. nobody ([대] 아무도 없다)
  14. The rang at seven. alarm ([명] 경보, 알람)
  15. Walk down the slowly. stair ([명] 계단)
  16. Earth is a beautiful . planet ([명] 행성)
  17. The queen is a . female ([형] 여성의 [명] 여성)
  18. Give me one more . chance ([명] 가능성, 기회)
  19. I need exercise. regular ([형] 정기적인, 보통의)
  20. Edison did the light. invent ([동] 발명하다)
  21. I stayed rain. because of (~때문에)
  22. My brother is a . teenager ([명] 십대)
  23. on your way. take care (조심하다)
  24. The old man is . deaf ([형] 귀가 안 들리는)

    ① planet② prepare③ bored④ everybody

    ① special② alike③ language④ take care
  10. invent ([동] 발명하다)
    ① copy② take care③ calm down④ planet
  11. alike ([형] 비슷한 [부] 비슷하게)

  12. calm down (진정하다)

DAY 05
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 repair [동] 고치다 [명] 수리 He can repair the bike. break fix
2 instant [형] 즉각적인, 즉석의 I like instant noodles. slow quick
3 advise [동] 충고하다, 조언하다 Teachers advise us to study. - suggest
4 totally [부] 완전히 I totally forgot your name. partly completely
5 freezing [형] 몹시 추운 The water is freezing today. boiling very cold
6 blank [형] 빈 [명] 빈칸 Write on the blank paper. full empty
7 important [형] 중요한 Health is very important. trivial main
8 teen [명] 십대 [형] 십대의 The teen is very tall. adult youth
9 weigh [동] 무게가 ~이다 How much do you weigh? - measure
10 regularly [부] 정기적으로 I exercise regularly. rarely often
11 law [명] 법, 법률 We must follow the law. - rule
12 rub [동] 비비다, 문지르다 Rub your hands together. - brush
13 pour [동] 붓다, 따르다 Pour some water for me. - flow
14 yet [부] 아직, 벌써 I have not finished yet. - still
15 skill [명] 기량, 기술 Singing is a great skill. - ability
16 neat [형] 정돈된, 단정한 Your room is very neat. messy clean
17 ache [동] 아프다 [명] 아픔 My head has an ache. comfort pain
18 patient [명] 환자 [형] 참을성 있는 Be patient and wait. angry calm
19 elderly [형] 나이가 지긋한 Help the elderly people. young old
20 wipe [동] 닦다 Wipe the table with a cloth. dirty clean
21 punch [동] 주먹으로 치다 Do not punch your friend. - hit
22 take out 꺼내다, 데리고 나가다 Take out your notebook. put in remove
23 get out of 나가다, 내리다 Get out of the car. enter leave
24 plenty of 많은, 충분한 We have plenty of food. few many

쓰기 연습Write & Remember
학습한 날짜 :

뜻과 단어를 확인하고, 오른쪽 줄에 영어 단어를 3번 따라 쓰세요. 따라 쓸 때는 반드시 큰 소리로 단어를 읽으세요.

No.단어뜻3번 쓰기
1 neat [형] 정돈된, 단정한
2 ache [동] 아프다 [명] 아픔
3 advise [동] 충고하다, 조언하다
4 blank [형] 빈 [명] 빈칸
5 repair [동] 고치다 [명] 수리
6 law [명] 법, 법률
7 skill [명] 기량, 기술
8 pour [동] 붓다, 따르다
9 take out 꺼내다, 데리고 나가다
10 teen [명] 십대 [형] 십대의
11 important [형] 중요한
12 weigh [동] 무게가 ~이다
13 wipe [동] 닦다
14 get out of 나가다, 내리다
15 rub [동] 비비다, 문지르다
16 freezing [형] 몹시 추운
17 instant [형] 즉각적인, 즉석의
18 totally [부] 완전히
19 patient [명] 환자 [형] 참을성 있는
20 plenty of 많은, 충분한
21 yet [부] 아직, 벌써
22 punch [동] 주먹으로 치다
23 regularly [부] 정기적으로
24 elderly [형] 나이가 지긋한

학습한 날짜 :

단어는 뜻을, 뜻은 단어를 쓰세요.

3 pack [동] 짐을 싸다 [명] 갑, 통
4 wonder [동] 궁금하다 [명] 놀라움
5 pill [명] 알약
6 ~로 유명하다 be famous for
7 ~을 생각해내다 think up
8 noisy [형] 시끄러운
9 taste [명] 맛 [동] 맛이 나다
10 [명] 계곡, 골짜기 valley
11 [명] 제복, 유니폼 uniform
12 [명] 조화, 화합 harmony
13 [전] ~없이 without
14 finally [부] 마침내, 결국
15 [명] 자연 nature
16 beauty [명] 아름다움, 미
17 crash [동] 충돌하다 [명] 충돌
18 male [형] 남성의 [명] 남성
19 bark [동] (개가) 짖다
20 [명] 햇빛, 햇살 sunlight
21 [형] 정확한 exact
22 able [형] 할 수 있는
23 pain [명] 통증, 고통
24 sometime [부] 언젠가

DAY 05
예문 빈칸 채우기Fill in the Blank
학습한 날짜 :

뜻을 참고하여 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 단어 은행에서 골라 쓰세요.

get out offreezingimportantregularlyneatrepairwipeteentake outyetpatientadviseelderlyblankplenty ofskillrubpourinstanttotallyweighpunchlawache
  1. The is very tall. teen ([명] 십대 [형] 십대의)
  2. Do not your friend. punch ([동] 주먹으로 치다)
  3. Write on the paper. blank ([형] 빈 [명] 빈칸)
  4. Health is very . important ([형] 중요한)
  5. I exercise . regularly ([부] 정기적으로)
  6. Singing is a great . skill ([명] 기량, 기술)
  7. My head has an . ache ([동] 아프다 [명] 아픔)
  8. He can the bike. repair ([동] 고치다 [명] 수리)
  9. your hands together. rub ([동] 비비다, 문지르다)
  10. I have not finished . yet ([부] 아직, 벌써)
  11. some water for me. pour ([동] 붓다, 따르다)
  12. Teachers us to study. advise ([동] 충고하다, 조언하다)
  13. Be and wait. patient ([명] 환자 [형] 참을성 있는)
  14. your notebook. take out (꺼내다, 데리고 나가다)
  15. I forgot your name. totally ([부] 완전히)
  16. I like noodles. instant ([형] 즉각적인, 즉석의)
  17. the car. get out of (나가다, 내리다)
  18. Your room is very . neat ([형] 정돈된, 단정한)
  19. The water is today. freezing ([형] 몹시 추운)
  20. Help the people. elderly ([형] 나이가 지긋한)
  21. the table with a cloth. wipe ([동] 닦다)
  22. We have food. plenty of (많은, 충분한)
  23. How much do you ? weigh ([동] 무게가 ~이다)
  24. We must follow the . law ([명] 법, 법률)
DAY 05
반의어 고르기Choose the Antonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. ache ([동] 아프다 [명] 아픔)
    ① repair② yet③ patient④ comfort
  2. wipe ([동] 닦다)
    ① yet② dirty③ repair④ get out of
  3. patient ([명] 환자 [형] 참을성 있는)
    ① plenty of② elderly③ pour④ angry
  4. neat ([형] 정돈된, 단정한)
    ① punch② messy③ plenty of④ take out
  5. plenty of (많은, 충분한)
    ① few② advise③ freezing④ wipe
  6. instant ([형] 즉각적인, 즉석의)
    ① patient② slow③ totally④ neat
  7. take out (꺼내다, 데리고 나가다)
    ① important② put in③ ache④ repair
  8. totally ([부] 완전히)
    ① elderly② advise③ partly④ neat
  9. blank ([형] 빈 [명] 빈칸)
    ① rub② instant③ full④ yet
  10. important ([형] 중요한)
    ① totally② trivial③ blank④ skill
  11. elderly ([형] 나이가 지긋한)
    ① patient② teen③ ache④ young
  12. regularly ([부] 정기적으로)
    ① rarely② freezing③ wipe④ important
  13. get out of (나가다, 내리다)
    ① advise② neat③ pour④ enter
  14. repair ([동] 고치다 [명] 수리)
    ① freezing② wipe③ get out of④ break
  15. freezing ([형] 몹시 추운)
    ① skill② advise③ totally④ boiling
  16. teen ([명] 십대 [형] 십대의)
    ① get out of② skill③ adult④ elderly

학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 동의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. yet ([부] 아직, 벌써)

    ① repair② patient③ youth④ totally
  4. wipe ([동] 닦다)
    ① clean② freezing③ instant④ ache

    ① rub② main③ neat④ ache
  6. law ([명] 법, 법률)
    ① patient② rule③ elderly④ skill
  7. neat ([형] 정돈된, 단정한)
    ① skill② freezing③ clean④ teen
  8. pour ([동] 붓다, 따르다)
    ① neat② ache③ get out of④ flow
  9. instant ([형] 즉각적인, 즉석의)
    ① quick② wipe③ take out④ pour
  10. elderly ([형] 나이가 지긋한)
    ① old② law③ weigh④ get out of
  11. repair ([동] 고치다 [명] 수리)
    ① fix② take out③ rub④ pour
  12. totally ([부] 완전히)
    ① patient② advise③ completely④ skill
  13. regularly ([부] 정기적으로)
    ① blank② advise③ ache④ often
  14. weigh ([동] 무게가 ~이다)
    ① regularly② freezing③ measure④ advise
  15. skill ([명] 기량, 기술)
    ① blank② patient③ ache④ ability
  16. rub ([동] 비비다, 문지르다)
    ① neat② regularly③ ache④ brush
  17. patient ([명] 환자 [형] 참을성 있는)
    ① get out of② plenty of③ blank④ calm
  18. plenty of (많은, 충분한)
    ① many② punch③ take out④ ache
  19. ache ([동] 아프다 [명] 아픔)
    ① regularly② teen③ pain④ law
  20. advise ([동] 충고하다, 조언하다)
    ① suggest② freezing③ totally④ blank
  21. freezing ([형] 몹시 추운)
    ① regularly② punch③ skill④ very cold
  22. punch ([동] 주먹으로 치다)
    ① plenty of② important③ blank④ hit
  23. take out (꺼내다, 데리고 나가다)
    ① elderly② remove③ punch④ weigh
  24. blank ([형] 빈 [명] 빈칸)
    ① freezing② patient③ empty④ skill
DAY 06
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 afraid [형] 두려워하는, 걱정하는 I am afraid of cats. brave scared
2 bottom [명] 바닥, 아래쪽 Put it on the bottom. top base
3 central [형] 중심의, 중앙의 The park is in central Seoul. side middle
4 depth [명] 깊이 The water has great depth. - -
5 energy [명] 에너지, 활기 Kids have a lot of energy. weak power
6 flash [명] 번쩍임 [동] 비추다 A flash of light appeared. dark light
7 ground [명] 땅, 지면 Sit down on the ground. sky earth
8 huge [형] 거대한, 매우 큰 That elephant is very huge. tiny big
9 inside [부] 안에 [명] 안쪽 Come inside the warm house. outside within
10 jewelry [명] 보석류 She wears beautiful jewelry. - gem
11 keep [동] 유지하다, 보관하다 Keep your room clean. lose hold
12 list [명] 목록, 리스트 Make a shopping list. - record
13 million [명] 100만 He has a million followers. - -
14 notice [동] 알아차리다 [명] 통지 I notice a small bird. ignore see
15 original [형] 원래의, 독창적인 This is the original book. copy first
16 period [명] 기간, 시기 We have a rest period. - time
17 quiet [형] 조용한, 정숙한 Please be quiet in library. noisy silent
18 remind [동] 상기시키다 Remind me to call mom. forget remember
19 shadow [명] 그림자 The tree has a long shadow. light shade
20 thick [형] 두꺼운, 진한 This book is very thick. thin fat
21 useful [형] 유용한, 쓸모 있는 This tool is very useful. useless helpful
22 look for ~을 찾다 I look for my bag. find search
23 give up 포기하다 Do not give up now. continue stop
24 for a long time 오랫동안 I waited for a long time. - -

DAY 06
예문 빈칸 채우기Fill in the Blank
학습한 날짜 :

뜻을 참고하여 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 단어 은행에서 골라 쓰세요.

afraidkeepusefulgroundinsideenergyoriginalcentralshadowremindjewelrylistfor a long timelook forbottomperiodmillionnoticequietgive updepththickhugeflash
  1. Sit down on the . ground ([명] 땅, 지면)
  2. I waited . for a long time (오랫동안)
  3. I am of cats. afraid ([형] 두려워하는, 걱정하는)
  4. me to call mom. remind ([동] 상기시키다)
  5. The tree has a long . shadow ([명] 그림자)
  6. This tool is very . useful ([형] 유용한, 쓸모 있는)
  7. A of light appeared. flash ([명] 번쩍임 [동] 비추다)
  8. Do not now. give up (포기하다)
  9. The park is in Seoul. central ([형] 중심의, 중앙의)
  10. That elephant is very . huge ([형] 거대한, 매우 큰)
  11. This is the book. original ([형] 원래의, 독창적인)
  12. Make a shopping . list ([명] 목록, 리스트)
  13. He has a followers. million ([명] 100만)
  14. This book is very . thick ([형] 두꺼운, 진한)
  15. Kids have a lot of . energy ([명] 에너지, 활기)
  16. The water has great . depth ([명] 깊이)
  17. Put it on the . bottom ([명] 바닥, 아래쪽)
  18. I a small bird. notice ([동] 알아차리다 [명] 통지)
  19. She wears beautiful . jewelry ([명] 보석류)
  20. your room clean. keep ([동] 유지하다, 보관하다)
  21. I my bag. look for (~을 찾다)
  22. We have a rest . period ([명] 기간, 시기)
  23. Come the warm house. inside ([부] 안에 [명] 안쪽)
  24. Please be in library. quiet ([형] 조용한, 정숙한)
DAY 06
반의어 고르기Choose the Antonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. ground ([명] 땅, 지면)
    ① quiet② sky③ flash④ depth
  2. bottom ([명] 바닥, 아래쪽)
    ① top② central③ huge④ look for
  3. central ([형] 중심의, 중앙의)
    ① remind② huge③ inside④ side
  4. afraid ([형] 두려워하는, 걱정하는)
    ① brave② energy③ quiet④ million
  5. original ([형] 원래의, 독창적인)
    ① copy② huge③ notice④ afraid
  6. flash ([명] 번쩍임 [동] 비추다)
    ① afraid② dark③ jewelry④ look for
  7. remind ([동] 상기시키다)
    ① list② forget③ quiet④ depth
  8. give up (포기하다)
    ① million② continue③ list④ useful
  9. keep ([동] 유지하다, 보관하다)
    ① list② lose③ useful④ quiet
  10. useful ([형] 유용한, 쓸모 있는)
    ① notice② remind③ inside④ useless
  11. look for (~을 찾다)
    ① central② find③ give up④ notice
  12. energy ([명] 에너지, 활기)
    ① bottom② weak③ thick④ notice
  13. inside ([부] 안에 [명] 안쪽)
    ① list② period③ remind④ outside
  14. quiet ([형] 조용한, 정숙한)
    ① noisy② look for③ huge④ list
  15. thick ([형] 두꺼운, 진한)
    ① flash② remind③ huge④ thin
  16. shadow ([명] 그림자)
    ① light② remind③ for a long time④ give up
  17. notice ([동] 알아차리다 [명] 통지)
    ① useful② ignore③ thick④ depth
  18. huge ([형] 거대한, 매우 큰)
    ① tiny② ground③ jewelry④ for a long time

DAY 07
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 agree [동] 동의하다 I agree with your idea. differ okay
2 brave [형] 용감한 He is a brave boy. scared bold
3 character [명] 특징, 성격, 등장인물 I like this movie character. - personality
4 direct [형] 직접적인 [동] 지시하다 Is there a direct bus? indirect straight
5 energy [명] 에너지, 활기 I have no energy today. weak power
6 flat [형] 평평한 The table is very flat. bumpy level
7 guess [동] 추측하다 Can you guess the answer? know think
8 human [명] 인간, 사람 Every human needs food. animal person
9 instead [부] 대신에 Use this pen instead. - -
10 journey [명] 여행, 여정 Have a safe journey. - trip
11 kiss [동] 키스하다 [명] 키스 She gave a kiss to baby. - -
12 local [형] 지역의, 현지의 I buy local food here. foreign native
13 mind [명] 마음 [동] 꺼리다 He has a kind mind. body heart
14 novel [명] 소설 [형] 새로운 Read this interesting novel. - story
15 outside [부] 밖에 [명] 겉면 Let's play outside today. inside out
16 personal [형] 개인적인 This is my personal bag. public private
17 quit [동] 그만두다 I will quit the game. start stop
18 remove [동] 제거하다, 치우다 Remove the dirt from shoes. add take away
19 shape [명] 모양, 형태 What shape is the sun? - form
20 thin [형] 얇은, 마른 The paper is very thin. thick slim
21 useless [형] 쓸모없는 This old pen is useless. useful bad
22 take part in ~에 참여하다 Take part in the race. - join
23 run away 도망가다 The dog did run away. stay escape
24 at the same time 동시에 Both bells rang at once. - -

DAY 08
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 area [명] 지역, 구역 This area is very quiet. - zone
2 bridge [명] 다리 Cross the bridge carefully. - -
3 chemical [명] 화학 물질 Water is a safe chemical. - -
4 discover [동] 발견하다 Scientists discover new stars. hide find
5 envelope [명] 봉투 Put the letter in envelope. - cover
6 flavor [명] 맛, 풍미 I like the chocolate flavor. - taste
7 guide [명] 안내자 [동] 안내하다 The guide shows the way. follower leader
8 hungry [형] 배고픈 I am very hungry now. full -
9 item [명] 품목, 항목 Pick an item from list. - object
10 junior [형] 하위의, 나이가 어린 He is a junior student. senior younger
11 knee [명] 무릎 I hurt my left knee. - -
12 low [형] 낮은 The bird flies very low. high short
13 modern [형] 현대의 Look at this modern house. old new
14 nuclear [형] 핵의, 원자력의 They use nuclear power. - -
15 oven [명] 오븐 Bake the cookies in oven. - -
16 physical [형] 신체의, 육체의 We need physical exercise. mental body
17 race [명] 경주, 인종 Who won the bike race? - competition
18 repeat [동] 반복하다 Please repeat after me. - copy
19 sharp [형] 날카로운 Be careful with sharp pins. dull pointy
20 tie [동] 묶다 [명] 넥타이 I can tie my shoes. loose bind
21 value [명] 가치 This ring has great value. - worth
22 look up to ~를 존경하다 I look up to my dad. - respect
23 get along with ~와 잘 지내다 I get along with friends. fight -
24 for example 예를 들어 I like fruits, for example. - -

DAY 08
예문 빈칸 채우기Fill in the Blank
학습한 날짜 :

뜻을 참고하여 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 단어 은행에서 골라 쓰세요.

kneeitemrepeatraceflavorenvelopeovenget along withfor examplejuniorareasharpmodernlook up tonuclearphysicalvaluehungryguidelowtiediscoverchemicalbridge
  1. They use power. nuclear ([형] 핵의, 원자력의)
  2. This ring has great . value ([명] 가치)
  3. Bake the cookies in . oven ([명] 오븐)
  4. Look at this house. modern ([형] 현대의)
  5. Cross the carefully. bridge ([명] 다리)
  6. The bird flies very . low ([형] 낮은)
  7. I my dad. look up to (~를 존경하다)
  8. I like fruits, . for example (예를 들어)
  9. This is very quiet. area ([명] 지역, 구역)
  10. Please after me. repeat ([동] 반복하다)
  11. Pick an from list. item ([명] 품목, 항목)
  12. Scientists new stars. discover ([동] 발견하다)
  13. I can my shoes. tie ([동] 묶다 [명] 넥타이)
  14. Put the letter in . envelope ([명] 봉투)
  15. I hurt my left . knee ([명] 무릎)
  16. I am very now. hungry ([형] 배고픈)
  17. He is a student. junior ([형] 하위의, 나이가 어린)
  18. Water is a safe . chemical ([명] 화학 물질)
  19. I friends. get along with (~와 잘 지내다)
  20. Be careful with pins. sharp ([형] 날카로운)
  21. The shows the way. guide ([명] 안내자 [동] 안내하다)
  22. I like the chocolate . flavor ([명] 맛, 풍미)
  23. Who won the bike ? race ([명] 경주, 인종)
  24. We need exercise. physical ([형] 신체의, 육체의)

  2. get along with (~와 잘 지내다)

  5. junior ([형] 하위의, 나이가 어린)
    ① physical② discover③ senior④ nuclear
  6. sharp ([형] 날카로운)
    ① guide② dull③ area④ physical
  7. physical ([형] 신체의, 육체의)
    ① area② mental③ junior④ guide
  8. modern ([형] 현대의)
    ① flavor② envelope③ old④ look up to
  9. tie ([동] 묶다 [명] 넥타이)
    ① low② chemical③ loose④ race
  10. hungry ([형] 배고픈)
    ① race② full③ guide④ low

DAY 09
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 member [명] 회원, 일원 I am a club member. - part
2 serious [형] 심각한, 진지한 This is a serious problem. funny grave
3 afraid [형] 두려워하는 Do not be afraid. brave scared
4 dessert [명] 디저트, 후식 I want cake for dessert. - sweet
5 toothache [명] 치통 I have a bad toothache. - -
6 effect [명] 영향, 결과 The rain has an effect. cause result
7 skillful [형] 숙련된, 능숙한 He is a skillful cook. clumsy expert
8 silence [명] 고요, 침묵 I like silence at night. noise quiet
9 stomach [명] 위, 배 My stomach feels very full. - tummy
10 print [동] 인쇄하다 Print the paper now. erase copy
11 safely [부] 안전하게 Drive the car safely. - securely
12 importance [명] 중요성 Water has great importance. - value
13 review [동] 검토하다, 복습하다 Review your lesson today. forget study
14 strange [형] 이상한, 낯선 I saw a strange bird. normal odd
15 burn [동] 타다, 태우다 Fire can burn the wood. cool fire
16 talented [형] 재능 있는 She is a talented singer. - gifted
17 bare [형] 벌거벗은 Walk with bare feet. covered naked
18 housework [명] 집안일 I help with housework. - chore
19 however [부] 그러나 However, it is raining. - but
20 accept [동] 받아들이다 I accept your gift. reject receive
21 mark [명] 자국, 표시 Put a mark here. - spot
22 not ... anymore 더 이상 ... 않다 I do not cry anymore. still no more
23 pass through 지나가다, 통과하다 Pass through the tunnel. stay go across
24 in fact 사실은 In fact, I am hungry. - actually

17 in fact 사실은

safelybarememberprintburnin facteffectmarknot ... anymoredessertreviewtalentedseriouspass throughstomachtoothachehouseworksilenceafraidskillfulacceptimportancestrangehowever

  11. I have a bad . toothache ([명] 치통)

DAY 10
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 return [동] 돌아오다, 반납하다 Return the book soon. leave come back
2 press [동] 누르다 Press the red button. pull push
3 focus [동] 집중하다 Focus on your work. - concentrate
4 dictionary [명] 사전 Look in the dictionary. - word book
5 allow [동] 허락하다 My mom will allow it. stop let
6 breathe [동] 숨 쉬다 Breathe the fresh air. - inhale
7 trash [명] 쓰레기 Pick up the trash. clean garbage
8 success [명] 성공 The show was a success. failure victory
9 rise [동] 오르다, 뜨다 The sun will rise soon. fall go up
10 topic [명] 주제, 화제 What is the topic today? - subject
11 scare [동] 겁주다 Do not scare the baby. calm frighten
12 step [명] 걸음, 단계 Watch your step here. - footstep
13 cooking [명] 요리 I like cooking with mom. - making food
14 anger [명] 화, 분노 His anger went away. peace fury
15 own [형] 자신의 [동] 소유하다 I own a small cat. - possess
16 praise [동] 칭찬하다 Teachers praise good kids. scold compliment
17 continue [동] 계속하다 Please continue the story. stop keep on
18 wooden [형] 나무로 된 I have a wooden chair. metal wood
19 certain [형] 확실한, 어떤 I am certain about it. unsure sure
20 less [형] 더 적은 Eat less sugar, please. more fewer
21 entire [형] 전체의 I ate the entire pizza. part whole
22 at least 적어도, 최소한 Wait at least ten minutes. - minimum
23 no longer 더 이상 ... 않다 He is no longer here. still not anymore
24 look up 찾아보다 Look up the word here. ignore search

risereturnwoodencertainsuccesspraisetrashtopicno longerdictionaryfocuslook upangerpresscontinuelessstepbreatheallowownscareat leastentirecooking

  5. Pick up the . trash ([명] 쓰레기)
  6. His went away. anger ([명] 화, 분노)
  7. I have a chair. wooden ([형] 나무로 된)

  9. I a small cat. own ([형] 자신의 [동] 소유하다)
  10. The sun will soon. rise ([동] 오르다, 뜨다)
  11. He is here. no longer (더 이상 ... 않다)
  12. the fresh air. breathe ([동] 숨 쉬다)
  13. I am about it. certain ([형] 확실한, 어떤)
  14. the word here. look up (찾아보다)
  15. Wait ten minutes. at least (적어도, 최소한)
  16. My mom will it. allow ([동] 허락하다)
  17. the red button. press ([동] 누르다)
  18. I like with mom. cooking ([명] 요리)
  19. What is the today? topic ([명] 주제, 화제)
  20. Please the story. continue ([동] 계속하다)
  21. on your work. focus ([동] 집중하다)

    ① part② success③ certain④ breathe
  2. scare ([동] 겁주다)
    ① calm② press③ look up④ success

  5. less ([형] 더 적은)
    ① anger② certain③ more④ topic
  6. wooden ([형] 나무로 된)
    ① continue② entire③ metal④ return
  7. allow ([동] 허락하다)
    ① stop② success③ continue④ topic

    ① allow② return③ praise④ unsure
  11. return ([동] 돌아오다, 반납하다)
    ① cooking② at least③ leave④ topic
  12. rise ([동] 오르다, 뜨다)
    ① praise② fall③ certain④ focus

    ① topic② peace③ no longer④ wooden
  14. success ([명] 성공)
    ① at least② entire③ failure④ continue
  15. press ([동] 누르다)

    ① still② scare③ certain④ look up

DAY 11
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 flight [명] 비행, 항공편 The flight was very long. - trip
2 hunter [명] 사냥꾼 The hunter is in forest. - -
3 scared [형] 두려워하는 I am scared of dark. brave afraid
4 medicine [명] 약 Take your medicine now. - pill
5 text [명] 글, 본문 Read the text on page. - book
6 boil [동] 끓이다, 삶다 Boil the water for tea. freeze cook
7 foreign [형] 외국의 I like foreign food. local -
8 lie [동] 눕다, 거짓말하다 Do not tell a lie. tell truth -
9 pleasure [명] 즐거움 It is a pleasure. pain joy
10 dirt [명] 먼지, 흙 Wash the dirt off hands. clean soil
11 everywhere [부] 모든 곳에 Flowers are everywhere. nowhere -
12 traffic [명] 교통(량) The traffic is very slow. - cars
13 hike [명] 하이킹 [동] 하이킹하다 Let's hike up the hill. - walk
14 beyond [전] ... 너머에 Look beyond the river. - over
15 succeed [동] 성공하다 You can succeed in tests. fail win
16 failure [명] 실패 Do not fear failure. success loss
17 stranger [명] 낯선 사람 Do not talk to stranger. friend -
18 aid [명] 도움, 지원 They gave aid to kids. - help
19 toward [전] ...을 향하여 Walk toward the school. away to
20 sheet [명] 시트, 장 Give me a sheet of paper. - paper
21 powerful [형] 강력한 The king is very powerful. weak strong
22 cut ... into pieces ...을 조각으로 자르다 Cut the apple into pieces. - chop
23 stay up 깨어 있다 Do not stay up late. sleep -
24 get along with ...와 잘 지내다 I get along with Sam. fight -

flightmedicineaidbeyondforeignget along withboilpleasuretowardhuntereverywherepowerfulfailuretrafficcut ... into piecesstrangerstay upscaredhikedirttextliesheetsucceed

  3. I like food. foreign ([형] 외국의)
  4. They gave to kids. aid ([명] 도움, 지원)

  6. The is very slow. traffic ([명] 교통(량))
  7. Give me a of paper. sheet ([명] 시트, 장)
  8. I Sam. get along with (...와 잘 지내다)
  9. Look the river. beyond ([전] ... 너머에)
  10. Flowers are . everywhere ([부] 모든 곳에)
  11. Take your now. medicine ([명] 약)
  12. The was very long. flight ([명] 비행, 항공편)
  13. Read the on page. text ([명] 글, 본문)
  14. It is a . pleasure ([명] 즐거움)
  15. Do not talk to . stranger ([명] 낯선 사람)
  16. I am of dark. scared ([형] 두려워하는)
  17. Let's up the hill. hike ([명] 하이킹 [동] 하이킹하다)
  18. You can in tests. succeed ([동] 성공하다)
  19. the water for tea. boil ([동] 끓이다, 삶다)

  21. Do not fear . failure ([명] 실패)
  22. Do not tell a . lie ([동] 눕다, 거짓말하다)

학습한 날짜 :

  1. powerful ([형] 강력한)
    ① traffic② medicine③ flight④ weak
  2. dirt ([명] 먼지, 흙)
    ① medicine② boil③ clean④ sheet

    ① away② text③ beyond④ failure

DAY 11
동의어 고르기Choose the Synonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 동의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. flight ([명] 비행, 항공편)
    ① foreign② toward③ stay up④ trip
  2. boil ([동] 끓이다, 삶다)
    ① aid② cut ... into pieces③ lie④ cook
  3. traffic ([명] 교통(량))
    ① aid② flight③ cars④ dirt
  4. dirt ([명] 먼지, 흙)
    ① soil② traffic③ succeed④ foreign
  5. medicine ([명] 약)
    ① succeed② lie③ cut ... into pieces④ pill
  6. cut ... into pieces (...을 조각으로 자르다)
    ① stay up② chop③ powerful④ stranger
  7. powerful ([형] 강력한)
    ① dirt② foreign③ toward④ strong
  8. pleasure ([명] 즐거움)
    ① stranger② joy③ cut ... into pieces④ hunter
  9. toward ([전] ...을 향하여)
    ① hike② to③ foreign④ failure
  10. beyond ([전] ... 너머에)
    ① flight② everywhere③ over④ medicine
  11. sheet ([명] 시트, 장)
    ① paper② stay up③ text④ medicine
  12. aid ([명] 도움, 지원)
    ① pleasure② hunter③ help④ toward
  13. text ([명] 글, 본문)
    ① book② beyond③ sheet④ scared
  14. scared ([형] 두려워하는)
    ① hunter② sheet③ lie④ afraid
  15. failure ([명] 실패)
    ① everywhere② boil③ scared④ loss
  16. succeed ([동] 성공하다)
    ① traffic② sheet③ medicine④ win
  17. hike ([명] 하이킹 [동] 하이킹하다)
    ① walk② flight③ powerful④ foreign
DAY 12
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 scary [형] 무서운, 두려운 That movie was so scary. funny spooky
2 foreigner [명] 외국인 The foreigner speaks English well. local -
3 basic [형] 기본적인, 기초적인 This is a basic math rule. hard easy
4 successful [형] 성공적인 He is a successful man. - great
5 worried [형] 걱정스러운 I am worried about my test. happy afraid
6 quickly [부] 빨리, 빠르게 Run to the school quickly. slowly fast
7 peace [명] 평화, 평온함 We all want world peace. war quiet
8 cartoon [명] 만화 (영화) I like to watch cartoons. - movie
9 century [명] 1세기, 100년 A century is 100 years. - -
10 rude [형] 무례한, 버릇없는 Do not be rude to others. polite mean
11 healthy [형] 건강한 Eating fruit is very healthy. sick well
12 narrow [형] 좁은 The road is very narrow. wide small
13 simple [형] 단순한, 간단한 It is a simple question. complex easy
14 thick [형] 두꺼운, 진한 Use a thick winter coat. thin heavy
15 useful [형] 유용한, 쓸모있는 This map is very useful. useless helpful
16 famous [형] 유명한 He is a famous actor. unknown popular
17 special [형] 특별한 Today is a special day. common unique
18 public [형] 공공의, 대중의 I use the public library. private social
19 whole [형] 전체의, 모든 I ate the whole cake. part entire
20 deep [형] 깊은 The water is very deep. shallow low
21 main [형] 주요한, 주된 This is the main street. minor chief
22 take part in ~에 참여하다 I take part in games. - join
23 run out of ~이 다 떨어지다 We run out of milk. - lose
24 by the way 그런데 (화제 전환) By the way, how are you? - anyway

publicspecialthickby the wayquicklyscaryrun out oftake part indeeprudebasicsuccessfulfamoussimplewholecartoonmainnarrowusefulhealthyworriedforeignercenturypeace

  2. We all want world . peace ([명] 평화, 평온함)
  3. I am about my test. worried ([형] 걱정스러운)
  4. The water is very . deep ([형] 깊은)
  5. The speaks English well. foreigner ([명] 외국인)
  6. Today is a day. special ([형] 특별한)
  7. That movie was so . scary ([형] 무서운, 두려운)
  8. I use the library. public ([형] 공공의, 대중의)
  9. We milk. run out of (~이 다 떨어지다)
  10. This is the street. main ([형] 주요한, 주된)
  11. Do not be to others. rude ([형] 무례한, 버릇없는)
  12. I games. take part in (~에 참여하다)
  13. This map is very . useful ([형] 유용한, 쓸모있는)
  14. This is a math rule. basic ([형] 기본적인, 기초적인)
  15. Eating fruit is very . healthy ([형] 건강한)
  16. Use a winter coat. thick ([형] 두꺼운, 진한)
  17. , how are you? by the way (그런데 (화제 전환))
  18. He is a actor. famous ([형] 유명한)
  19. He is a man. successful ([형] 성공적인)
  20. I ate the cake. whole ([형] 전체의, 모든)
  21. It is a question. simple ([형] 단순한, 간단한)
  22. A is 100 years. century ([명] 1세기, 100년)
  23. Run to the school . quickly ([부] 빨리, 빠르게)
  24. The road is very . narrow ([형] 좁은)

학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. worried ([형] 걱정스러운)
    ① happy② successful③ century④ cartoon
  2. special ([형] 특별한)
    ① peace② by the way③ common④ successful
  3. narrow ([형] 좁은)
    ① useful② century③ simple④ wide
  4. thick ([형] 두꺼운, 진한)
    ① simple② deep③ thin④ by the way
  5. peace ([명] 평화, 평온함)
    ① quickly② war③ successful④ foreigner
  6. public ([형] 공공의, 대중의)
    ① foreigner② by the way③ private④ special
  7. simple ([형] 단순한, 간단한)
    ① take part in② complex③ whole④ foreigner
  8. main ([형] 주요한, 주된)
    ① worried② successful③ foreigner④ minor
  9. whole ([형] 전체의, 모든)
    ① run out of② worried③ foreigner④ part
  10. famous ([형] 유명한)
    ① main② worried③ unknown④ narrow
  11. deep ([형] 깊은)
    ① take part in② shallow③ foreigner④ useful
  12. useful ([형] 유용한, 쓸모있는)
    ① take part in② useless③ basic④ successful
  13. scary ([형] 무서운, 두려운)
    ① public② simple③ funny④ main
  14. rude ([형] 무례한, 버릇없는)
    ① successful② polite③ special④ simple
  15. healthy ([형] 건강한)
    ① rude② sick③ take part in④ main
  16. basic ([형] 기본적인, 기초적인)
    ① successful② hard③ narrow④ take part in
  17. quickly ([부] 빨리, 빠르게)
    ① slowly② worried③ main④ useful
  18. foreigner ([명] 외국인)
    ① take part in② rude③ local④ simple

    ① rude② healthy③ public④ movie

  11. whole ([형] 전체의, 모든)
    ① century② entire③ simple④ by the way
  12. take part in (~에 참여하다)
    ① join② famous③ rude④ main

DAY 13
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 nature [명] 자연, 본성 We must protect our nature. - earth
2 national [형] 국가의, 국립의 This is a national park. local state
3 natural [형] 자연의, 당연한 It is his natural hair. artificial normal
4 discover [동] 발견하다 Scientists discover new stars. hide find
5 discovery [명] 발견 It was a great discovery. - finding
6 invent [동] 발명하다 Who did invent the phone? copy make
7 invention [명] 발명(품) The car is a great invention. - creation
8 inventor [명] 발명가 Edison was a famous inventor. - maker
9 direct [형] 직접적인 [동] 지휘하다 Take the direct flight home. indirect straight
10 direction [명] 방향, 지시 Walk in the right direction. - way
11 director [명] 감독, 관리자 He is a movie director. - manager
12 active [형] 활동적인, 적극적인 She is an active girl. lazy busy
13 activity [명] 활동 I like outdoor activity. - action
14 actor [명] 배우 He is my favorite actor. - player
15 actual [형] 실제의, 사실상의 Tell me the actual facts. fake real
16 actually [부] 실제로, 사실은 Actually, I am very hungry. - really
17 visit [동] 방문하다 [명] 방문 I visit my grandma today. leave see
18 visitor [명] 방문객 Many visitor come to Jeju. - guest
19 danger [명] 위험 The sign says danger here. safety risk
20 dangerous [형] 위험한 Playing with fire is dangerous. safe risky
21 perform [동] 공연하다, 수행하다 They perform on the stage. - show
22 look after ~을 돌보다 I look after my brother. ignore take care
23 give a hand 도와주다 Can you give a hand? - help
24 ahead of ~보다 앞선 He is ahead of me. behind before

20 discovery [명] 발견

DAY 13
예문 빈칸 채우기Fill in the Blank
학습한 날짜 :

뜻을 참고하여 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 단어 은행에서 골라 쓰세요.

performdirectvisitornationalinventionahead ofinventdangerdiscoverinventorgive a handvisitnaturalactiveactordiscoverydangerouslook afteractualactivitydirectordirectionnatureactually
  1. Tell me the facts. actual ([형] 실제의, 사실상의)
  2. He is my favorite . actor ([명] 배우)
  3. Who did the phone? invent ([동] 발명하다)
  4. I my grandma today. visit ([동] 방문하다 [명] 방문)
  5. It was a great . discovery ([명] 발견)
  6. Walk in the right . direction ([명] 방향, 지시)
  7. I like outdoor . activity ([명] 활동)
  8. We must protect our . nature ([명] 자연, 본성)

  11. Playing with fire is . dangerous ([형] 위험한)
  12. It is his hair. natural ([형] 자연의, 당연한)
  13. He is a movie . director ([명] 감독, 관리자)
  14. Scientists new stars. discover ([동] 발견하다)
  15. This is a park. national ([형] 국가의, 국립의)

  17. Can you ? give a hand (도와주다)
  18. Take the flight home. direct ([형] 직접적인 [동] 지휘하다)
  19. He is me. ahead of (~보다 앞선)
  20. Edison was a famous . inventor ([명] 발명가)

  23. , I am very hungry. actually ([부] 실제로, 사실은)

DAY 13
반의어 고르기Choose the Antonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. direct ([형] 직접적인 [동] 지휘하다)
    ① give a hand② indirect③ dangerous④ active
  2. visit ([동] 방문하다 [명] 방문)
    ① inventor② give a hand③ discovery④ leave
  3. active ([형] 활동적인, 적극적인)
    ① invention② give a hand③ lazy④ visit
  4. dangerous ([형] 위험한)
    ① actual② national③ invention④ safe
  5. natural ([형] 자연의, 당연한)
    ① danger② invention③ dangerous④ artificial
  6. national ([형] 국가의, 국립의)
    ① actually② local③ invent④ visitor
  7. danger ([명] 위험)
    ① national② safety③ perform④ visit
  8. look after (~을 돌보다)
    ① dangerous② actually③ ignore④ director
  9. actual ([형] 실제의, 사실상의)
    ① actually② fake③ nature④ invent
  10. discover ([동] 발견하다)
    ① direction② hide③ actor④ danger
  11. invent ([동] 발명하다)
    ① director② copy③ inventor④ direct
  12. ahead of (~보다 앞선)
    ① actual② national③ director④ behind

DAY 14
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 science [명] 과학 I like science class best. - -
2 scientist [명] 과학자 I want to be a scientist. - -
3 art [명] 예술, 미술 Art is my favorite hobby. - -
4 artist [명] 예술가, 화가 My sister is a great artist. - painter
5 artistic [형] 예술적인 She has artistic talent. - -
6 music [명] 음악 Listen to the sweet music. - -
7 musical [형] 음악의 [명] 뮤지컬 I love musical movies. - -
8 musician [명] 음악가 He is a talented musician. - player
9 report [동] 보고하다 [명] 보고서 Write a report about it. - tell
10 reporter [명] 기자, 리포터 The reporter is on TV. - writer
11 paint [동] 칠하다, 그리다 Paint the wall blue now. - draw
12 painter [명] 화가, 페인트공 The painter uses many colors. - artist
13 painting [명] 그림 This painting is very old. - picture
14 create [동] 창조하다, 만들다 God did create the world. destroy make
15 creative [형] 창의적인 You have a creative mind. - unique
16 creator [명] 창조자, 제작자 He is a content creator. - maker
17 swim [동] 수영하다 I like to swim in summer. - -
18 swimmer [명] 수영 선수 He is a fast swimmer. - -
19 win [동] 이기다, 얻다 I hope we win today. lose beat
20 winner [명] 승자, 우승자 The winner gets a medal. loser champion
21 travel [동] 여행하다 [명] 여행 We travel to Seoul today. - trip
22 take a look ~을 보다 Take a look at this. - see
23 day after day 매일매일 I study day after day. - daily
24 fall down 넘어지다, 떨어지다 Do not fall down stairs. - drop

writespeakcome truebuildingtry onkillerloserteacherall over the worldlistenerworkleadwritingdrivelistenteachlosebuildkillbuilderleaderdriverwriterspeaker

반의어 고르기Choose the Antonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. listener ([명] 청취자)
    ① kill② teach③ speaker④ lose
  2. teacher ([명] 선생님)
    ① student② work③ all over the world④ drive
  3. write ([동] 쓰다)
    ① lead② read③ listener④ speaker
  4. lose ([동] 잃다, 지다)
    ① win② building③ builder④ teacher
  5. work ([동] 일하다 [명] 일)
    ① all over the world② rest③ writing④ killer
  6. speak ([동] 말하다)
    ① listen② teach③ silent④ builder
  7. speaker ([명] 연사, 스피커)
    ① driver② listener③ leader④ lead
  8. lead ([동] 이끌다, 안내하다)
    ① follow② write③ listen④ speak
  9. build ([동] 짓다, 세우다)
    ① teacher② destroy③ drive④ driver
  10. leader ([명] 지도자, 리더)
    ① come true② follower③ writing④ builder
  11. kill ([동] 죽이다)
    ① write② building③ listener④ save
  12. loser ([명] 패배자)
    ① building② teacher③ kill④ winner
  13. teach ([동] 가르치다)
    ① learn② build③ building④ leader

  1. lead ([동] 이끌다, 안내하다)
    ① driver② speak③ listener④ guide

  5. building ([명] 건물, 빌딩)
    ① house② listen③ build④ builder
  6. write ([동] 쓰다)
    ① loser② teach③ record④ try on
  7. leader ([명] 지도자, 리더)
    ① speak② try on③ drive④ boss

    ① listen② teacher③ kill④ global
  9. listener ([명] 청취자)

    ① builder② writer③ lose④ make

    ① build② speak③ happen④ all over the world

    ① writer② drive③ job④ driver

DAY 16
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 act [동] 행동하다 [명] 행위 Think before you act. - do
2 action [명] 행동, 조치 Take action right now. - move
3 care [동] 상관하다 [명] 보살핌 I care about my family. neglect look after
4 careful [형] 주의 깊은 Be careful with the glass. careless cautious
5 careless [형] 부주의한 It was a careless mistake. careful messy
6 help [동] 돕다 [명] 도움 Can you help me today? hurt aid
7 helpful [형] 도움이 되는 This book is very helpful. useless useful
8 helpless [형] 무력한 The baby felt helpless. strong weak
9 hope [동] 바라다 [명] 희망 I hope for a sunny day. fear wish
10 hopeful [형] 희망적인 I feel hopeful about it. hopeless positive
11 hopeless [형] 절망적인 The situation is hopeless. hopeful bad
12 use [동] 사용하다 [명] 사용 I use a red pen. - utilize
13 useful [형] 유용한 This tool is useful. useless helpful
14 useless [형] 쓸모없는 This broken toy is useless. useful bad
15 power [명] 힘, 능력 The king has great power. weak strength
16 powerful [형] 강력한 He is a powerful man. weak strong
17 powerless [형] 힘없는 I felt powerless to stop. powerful weak
18 beauty [명] 아름다움 She has great beauty. ugly pretty
19 beautiful [형] 아름다운 What a beautiful flower! ugly pretty
20 wonder [동] 궁금하다 [명] 놀라움 I wonder who he is. - think
21 wonderful [형] 멋진, 놀라운 We had a wonderful time. bad great
22 pick up 집어 들다, 태우러 가다 Pick up the trash, please. drop take
23 throw away 버리다 Throw away the old food. keep dump
24 once upon a time 옛날 옛적에 Once upon a time, kings. - long ago

    ① care② beauty③ powerful④ drop

    ① wonder② useful③ use④ helpful
  4. useful ([형] 유용한)

    ① powerful② useless③ weak④ helpful

    ① power② weak③ help④ helpful
  11. beauty ([명] 아름다움)
    ① action② ugly③ beautiful④ use
  12. powerless ([형] 힘없는)

    ① wonder② hopeful③ hope④ careful

DAY 17
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 different [형] 다른 They are different colors. same unlike
2 difference [명] 차이(점) What is the difference? same gap
3 difficult [형] 어려운 Math is difficult for me. easy hard
4 difficulty [명] 어려움 I have some difficulty. ease trouble
5 kind [형] 친절한 [명] 종류 Be kind to your friends. mean nice
6 kindness [명] 친절 Thank you for your kindness. mean grace
7 happy [형] 행복한 I am so happy today. sad glad
8 happiness [명] 행복 Health brings happiness. misery joy
9 lonely [형] 외로운 I feel lonely today. social alone
10 loneliness [명] 외로움 He felt deep loneliness. - -
11 dark [형] 어두운 [명] 어둠 The room is very dark. bright black
12 darkness [명] 어둠 I am afraid of darkness. light night
13 weak [형] 약한 My legs feel very weak. strong soft
14 weakness [명] 약점 Coffee is my weakness. strength flaw
15 illness [명] 병, 질환 She has a sudden illness. health sickness
16 sadness [명] 슬픔 Her face showed sadness. happiness grief
17 forest [명] 숲 Birds live in the forest. - wood
18 floor [명] 바닥, 층 Sit on the clean floor. ceiling ground
19 flow [동] 흐르다 Water flows in the river. - run
20 float [동] 뜨다, 떠다니다 Wood can float on water. sink swim
21 flood [명] 홍수 Heavy rain caused a flood. - -
22 worry about ~에 대해 걱정하다 Do not worry about me. - care
23 get to ~에 도착하다 I get to school at eight. leave reach
24 for a while 잠시 동안 Please wait for a while. - a moment

illnessfor a whilekindworry aboutdifficulthappinessfloorkindnessdifferentdifficultyflowlonelinessweaksadnessdarknessweaknessfloodlonelyfloatdarkget todifferenceforesthappy

  2. Water s in the river. flow ([동] 흐르다)
  3. I am so today. happy ([형] 행복한)
  4. I have some . difficulty ([명] 어려움)
  5. Sit on the clean . floor ([명] 바닥, 층)
  6. What is the ? difference ([명] 차이(점))
  7. My legs feel very . weak ([형] 약한)
  8. He felt deep . loneliness ([명] 외로움)
  9. She has a sudden . illness ([명] 병, 질환)
  10. I school at eight. get to (~에 도착하다)
  11. I am afraid of . darkness ([명] 어둠)
  12. They are colors. different ([형] 다른)
  13. Birds live in the . forest ([명] 숲)
  14. Her face showed . sadness ([명] 슬픔)
  15. Thank you for your . kindness ([명] 친절)
  16. Health brings . happiness ([명] 행복)
  17. Do not me. worry about (~에 대해 걱정하다)
  18. Please wait . for a while (잠시 동안)
  19. Be to your friends. kind ([형] 친절한 [명] 종류)
  20. Heavy rain caused a . flood ([명] 홍수)
  21. Math is for me. difficult ([형] 어려운)
  22. The room is very . dark ([형] 어두운 [명] 어둠)
  23. Coffee is my . weakness ([명] 약점)

DAY 17
반의어 고르기Choose the Antonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. sadness ([명] 슬픔)
    ① float② loneliness③ happiness④ for a while
  2. floor ([명] 바닥, 층)
    ① ceiling② get to③ different④ flood
  3. darkness ([명] 어둠)
    ① difficulty② different③ light④ loneliness
  4. lonely ([형] 외로운)
    ① flow② happiness③ social④ float
  5. difficulty ([명] 어려움)
    ① float② flood③ ease④ illness
  6. weak ([형] 약한)
    ① worry about② strong③ darkness④ difference
  7. float ([동] 뜨다, 떠다니다)
    ① sink② flow③ happiness④ difference
  8. happiness ([명] 행복)
    ① sadness② flow③ lonely④ misery
  9. dark ([형] 어두운 [명] 어둠)
    ① bright② happy③ different④ sadness
  10. happy ([형] 행복한)
    ① floor② happiness③ sad④ kindness
  11. illness ([명] 병, 질환)
    ① kindness② difference③ for a while④ health
  12. difference ([명] 차이(점))
    ① difficult② kindness③ weakness④ same
  13. different ([형] 다른)
    ① flow② same③ loneliness④ floor
  14. get to (~에 도착하다)
    ① dark② illness③ loneliness④ leave
  15. kind ([형] 친절한 [명] 종류)
    ① illness② difference③ mean④ loneliness
  16. kindness ([명] 친절)
    ① mean② weak③ sadness④ happiness
  17. weakness ([명] 약점)
    ① difficulty② kindness③ strength④ forest
  18. difficult ([형] 어려운)
    ① easy② worry about③ sadness④ flow

DAY 18
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 anywhere [부] 어디든지 You can sit anywhere. nowhere -
2 nearly [부] 거의 I am nearly finished. - almost
3 bite [동] 물다 [명] 한 입 Do not bite your nails. - chew
4 title [명] 제목 What is the book title? - name
5 upper [형] 위쪽의 He has an upper room. lower top
6 sum [명] 합계, 금액 The sum is ten dollars. - total
7 cartoon [명] 만화 I like this funny cartoon. - comic
8 anybody [대] 누구나, 누구든 Anybody can join the club. nobody anyone
9 fever [명] 열 I have a high fever. - heat
10 scenery [명] 풍경, 경치 The mountain scenery is great. - view
11 order [명] 순서, 주문 Please wait in order. - command
12 neither [대] 어느 쪽도 ~아니다 Neither of them is here. both -
13 diamond [명] 다이아몬드 She has a diamond ring. - -
14 source [명] 원천, 근원 Water is a source of life. - origin
15 huge [형] 거대한 This is a huge cake. tiny giant
16 contact [명] 연락 [동] 연락하다 Give me your contact number. - touch
17 attack [명] 공격 [동] 공격하다 Do not attack others. defend fight
18 sudden [형] 갑작스러운 There was a sudden rain. slow quick
19 period [명] 기간 We had a rest period. - time
20 journey [명] 여행 Have a safe journey. - trip
21 million [명] 100만 A million people live here. - -
22 give up 포기하다 Never give up your dream. keep on stop
23 hang out with ~와 어울리다 I hang out with Sam. - play with
24 make up 지어내다, 구성하다 Do not make up stories. - invent

DAY 18
반의어 고르기Choose the Antonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. neither ([대] 어느 쪽도 ~아니다)
    ① both② title③ period④ give up
  2. upper ([형] 위쪽의)
    ① huge② attack③ lower④ sudden
  3. anywhere ([부] 어디든지)
    ① nowhere② order③ anybody④ neither
  4. attack ([명] 공격 [동] 공격하다)
    ① fever② give up③ defend④ period
  5. huge ([형] 거대한)
    ① nearly② tiny③ sum④ sudden
  6. anybody ([대] 누구나, 누구든)
    ① title② cartoon③ nobody④ bite
  7. sudden ([형] 갑작스러운)
    ① slow② nearly③ hang out with④ attack

    ① anywhere② hang out with③ sudden④ keep on
DAY 18
동의어 고르기Choose the Synonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 동의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. sum ([명] 합계, 금액)
    ① total② anywhere③ neither④ give up
  2. order ([명] 순서, 주문)
    ① bite② make up③ huge④ command
  3. bite ([동] 물다 [명] 한 입)
    ① chew② nearly③ anywhere④ sum
  4. anybody ([대] 누구나, 누구든)
    ① anyone② neither③ title④ make up
  5. sudden ([형] 갑작스러운)
    ① quick② sum③ nearly④ hang out with
  6. make up (지어내다, 구성하다)
    ① period② sudden③ hang out with④ invent
  7. nearly ([부] 거의)
    ① huge② order③ almost④ source
  8. journey ([명] 여행)
    ① upper② trip③ period④ cartoon
  9. scenery ([명] 풍경, 경치)
    ① anywhere② view③ attack④ contact
  10. fever ([명] 열)
    ① upper② journey③ order④ heat
  11. attack ([명] 공격 [동] 공격하다)
    ① nearly② fight③ hang out with④ million
  12. contact ([명] 연락 [동] 연락하다)
    ① touch② nearly③ neither④ huge
  13. hang out with (~와 어울리다)
    ① play with② title③ journey④ sudden
  14. period ([명] 기간)
    ① sudden② time③ source④ scenery
  15. huge ([형] 거대한)
    ① bite② giant③ journey④ fever
  16. upper ([형] 위쪽의)
    ① contact② top③ huge④ million
  17. source ([명] 원천, 근원)
    ① diamond② origin③ upper④ period
  18. give up (포기하다)
    ① stop② order③ million④ huge
  19. title ([명] 제목)
    ① sudden② period③ upper④ name
  20. cartoon ([명] 만화)
    ① give up② sum③ huge④ comic
DAY 19
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 none [대] 아무도 ~않다 None of the food remains. all -
2 expression [명] 표현, 표정 I like your happy expression. - look
3 anytime [부] 언제든지 You can call me anytime. - -
4 shot [명] 발사, 슛 He made a great shot. - kick
5 death [명] 죽음 We felt sad about death. life -
6 ceiling [명] 천장 A fly is on ceiling. floor -
7 hug [동] 껴안다 Give your mom a hug. - hold
8 vision [명] 시력, 전망 He has a clear vision. - sight
9 social [형] 사회적인, 사교의 Man is a social animal. private public
10 century [명] 100년, 세기 It is the 21st century. - -
11 beard [명] 턱수염 My dad has a long beard. - -
12 surround [동] 둘러싸다 Trees surround the house. - circle
13 backward [부] 뒤로 Can you walk backward? forward behind
14 dynasty [명] 왕조 Joseon was a long dynasty. - -
15 follow [동] 따라가다, 따르다 Follow the yellow line. lead chase
16 effort [명] 노력 It takes a lot of effort. - work
17 impress [동] 감동을 주다 Your song did impress me. - touch
18 fair [형] 공정한, 타당한 That is a fair game. unfair right
19 recycle [동] 재활용하다 Recycle the plastic bottles. - reuse
20 suddenly [부] 갑자기 Suddenly, the light went out. slowly quickly
21 imagine [동] 상상하다 Imagine you are a bird. - think
22 watch out 주의하다, 조심하다 Watch out for the car! - be careful
23 not ... at all 전혀 ~아니다 I am not tired at all. - -
24 on time 제시간에 Please come to school on time. late -

DAY 20
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 giant [명] 거인 [형] 거대한 The giant is very tall. tiny huge
2 fortunately [부] 다행히 Fortunately, I found my key. unluckily luckily
3 tool [명] 도구 A hammer is a tool. - instrument
4 universe [명] 우주 The universe is very big. - space
5 global [형] 세계적인 English is a global language. local world
6 single [형] 하나의, 미혼의 I have a single ticket. double one
7 rough [형] 거친, 대강의 The sea is very rough. smooth uneven
8 salary [명] 급여 He gets a high salary. - pay
9 pimple [명] 여드름 I have a small pimple. - spot
10 raindrop [명] 빗방울 Look at the tiny raindrop. - -
11 sweat [명] 땀 [동] 땀을 흘리다 I have sweat on face. - -
12 rude [형] 무례한 It is rude to yell. polite mean
13 challenge [명] 도전 Math is a big challenge. - -
14 frankly [부] 솔직히 Frankly, I do not know. - honestly
15 neighbor [명] 이웃 He is my kind neighbor. - -
16 unfair [형] 불공평한 The rules are very unfair. fair bad
17 else [부] 그 밖의 Do you want anything else? - other
18 swing [동] 흔들리다 [명] 그네 I like to ride swing. - shake
19 master [명] 주인, 대가 He is a master cook. - boss
20 code [명] 암호, 부호 Write the secret code now. - secret
21 battery [명] 배터리 The toy needs a battery. - -
22 make fun of ~을 놀리다 Do not make fun of Sam. - tease
23 be afraid of ~을 두려워하다 I am afraid of dogs. - fear
24 clean up 청소하다, 치우다 Clean up your desk, please. dirty wash

  4. swing ([동] 흔들리다 [명] 그네)
    ① rough② shake③ universe④ fortunately
  5. code ([명] 암호, 부호)
    ① neighbor② raindrop③ secret④ salary
  6. unfair ([형] 불공평한)
    ① sweat② bad③ swing④ code
  7. rude ([형] 무례한)
    ① mean② fortunately③ unfair④ clean up
  8. clean up (청소하다, 치우다)
    ① tool② global③ wash④ be afraid of
  9. make fun of (~을 놀리다)
    ① master② swing③ tool④ tease
  10. single ([형] 하나의, 미혼의)
    ① one② challenge③ battery④ swing
  11. pimple ([명] 여드름)
    ① spot② battery③ make fun of④ code
  12. rough ([형] 거친, 대강의)
    ① single② raindrop③ pimple④ uneven
  13. salary ([명] 급여)
    ① global② pay③ universe④ swing
  14. universe ([명] 우주)
    ① space② clean up③ frankly④ single
  15. tool ([명] 도구)
    ① frankly② instrument③ neighbor④ global
  16. frankly ([부] 솔직히)
    ① honestly② pimple③ swing④ code
  17. global ([형] 세계적인)
    ① make fun of② world③ sweat④ single
  18. giant ([명] 거인 [형] 거대한)
    ① else② single③ salary④ huge
  19. fortunately ([부] 다행히)
    ① challenge② luckily③ raindrop④ salary
DAY 21
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 pedal [명] 페달 Push the bike pedal hard. - -
2 equally [부] 똑같이, 동등하게 Share the cake equally. - same
3 action [명] 행동, 조치 Take action right now. - move
4 sore [형] 아픈, 따가운 My throat is very sore. - painful
5 chore [명] 허드렛일, 일 I do my house chore. - job
6 process [명] 과정 [동] 가공하다 Follow the cooking process. - way
7 host [명] 주인, 진행자 He is a kind host. guest owner
8 connect [동] 연결하다 Connect the two toy cars. separate join
9 graphic [형] 그래픽의 I like the graphic art. - visual
10 billion [명] 10억 A billion is a big number. - -
11 merry [형] 즐거운 Have a merry Christmas. sad happy
12 decide [동] 결정하다 I decide to go home. - choose
13 trade [명] 무역, 교환 Let's trade our cards. - swap
14 enemy [명] 적 The cat is my enemy. friend foe
15 volume [명] 음량, 양 Turn up the TV volume. - sound
16 journal [명] 잡지, 일기 I write in my journal. - diary
17 pace [명] 속도 Walk at a slow pace. - speed
18 compare [동] 비교하다 Compare these two apples. - check
19 cloth [명] 천, 헝겊 Wipe it with a cloth. - fabric
20 novel [명] 소설 Read this long novel. - story
21 rate [명] 비율, 속도 The heart rate is fast. - speed
22 stop by 잠시 들르다 Stop by my house later. - visit
23 be over 끝나다 The game is finally over. start finish
24 push down 누르다 Push down the red button. lift press

choreprocesspaceconnectratevolumeclothnovelcompareenemysoremerrydecidebilliongraphicpedalbe overequallyjournalhostactionstop bytradepush down
  1. Follow the cooking . process ([명] 과정 [동] 가공하다)
  2. I like the art. graphic ([형] 그래픽의)
  3. the red button. push down (누르다)
  4. Wipe it with a . cloth ([명] 천, 헝겊)
  5. The game is finally over. ( ) be over (끝나다)
  6. Walk at a slow . pace ([명] 속도)
  7. Read this long . novel ([명] 소설)
  8. The heart is fast. rate ([명] 비율, 속도)
  9. these two apples. compare ([동] 비교하다)
  10. I do my house . chore ([명] 허드렛일, 일)
  11. He is a kind . host ([명] 주인, 진행자)
  12. I write in my . journal ([명] 잡지, 일기)
  13. Turn up the TV . volume ([명] 음량, 양)
  14. Let's our cards. trade ([명] 무역, 교환)
  15. Have a Christmas. merry ([형] 즐거운)
  16. I to go home. decide ([동] 결정하다)
  17. Share the cake . equally ([부] 똑같이, 동등하게)
  18. A is a big number. billion ([명] 10억)
  19. Take right now. action ([명] 행동, 조치)
  20. The cat is my . enemy ([명] 적)
  21. My throat is very . sore ([형] 아픈, 따가운)
  22. my house later. stop by (잠시 들르다)
  23. the two toy cars. connect ([동] 연결하다)
  24. Push the bike hard. pedal ([명] 페달)

DAY 22
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 gorgeous [형] 멋진, 우아한 You look gorgeous today. ugly beautiful
2 following [형] 다음의 Read the following words. past next
3 animation [명] 만화, 애니메이션 I love this animation. - cartoon
4 relax [동] 쉬다, 긴장을 풀다 Relax on the sofa. work rest
5 against [전] ~에 반대하여 I am against the plan. - -
6 duty [명] 의무, 직무 It is my duty here. - job
7 fur [명] 털, 모피 The cat has soft fur. - hair
8 defend [동] 방어하다, 지키다 Defend our goal post. attack protect
9 prove [동] 증명하다 I can prove it's true. - show
10 charge [명] 요금 [동] 청구하다 How much is the charge? - price
11 polite [형] 예의 바른 Be polite to old people. rude kind
12 footprint [명] 발자국 I see a big footprint. - -
13 impression [명] 인상, 감상 You gave a good impression. - feeling
14 seem [동] ~처럼 보이다 You seem very happy. - look
15 modern [형] 현대의 This is a modern car. old new
16 link [동] 연결하다 Link the two boxes. - connect
17 instrument [명] 도구, 악기 Piano is a musical instrument. - tool
18 seafood [명] 해산물 I like fresh seafood. - -
19 mild [형] 가벼운, 온화한 The curry is very mild. strong soft
20 forward [부] 앞쪽으로 Move forward one step. backward ahead
21 absent [형] 결석한 He is absent from school. present -
22 be covered with ~로 덮여 있다 The hill is covered with snow. - -
23 hand out ~을 나눠주다 Hand out the papers. - give
24 try one's best 최선을 다하다 I will try my best. - -

예문 빈칸 채우기Fill in the Blank
학습한 날짜 :

뜻을 참고하여 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 단어 은행에서 골라 쓰세요.

politeimpressionmodernfuranimationlinkgorgeousrelaxbe covered withchargedutyfollowingtry one's bestmildforwardseeminstrumentabsenthand outdefendfootprintproveseafoodagainst
  1. the two boxes. link ([동] 연결하다)
  2. You look today. gorgeous ([형] 멋진, 우아한)
  3. our goal post. defend ([동] 방어하다, 지키다)
  4. This is a car. modern ([형] 현대의)
  5. You gave a good . impression ([명] 인상, 감상)
  6. I see a big . footprint ([명] 발자국)
  7. I can it's true. prove ([동] 증명하다)
  8. the papers. hand out (~을 나눠주다)
  9. He is from school. absent ([형] 결석한)
  10. Read the words. following ([형] 다음의)
  11. Piano is a musical . instrument ([명] 도구, 악기)
  12. I like fresh . seafood ([명] 해산물)
  13. The hill is covered with snow. ( ) be covered with (~로 덮여 있다)
  14. You very happy. seem ([동] ~처럼 보이다)
  15. I will try my best. ( ) try one's best (최선을 다하다)
  16. Move one step. forward ([부] 앞쪽으로)
  17. on the sofa. relax ([동] 쉬다, 긴장을 풀다)
  18. How much is the ? charge ([명] 요금 [동] 청구하다)
  19. I am the plan. against ([전] ~에 반대하여)
  20. The cat has soft . fur ([명] 털, 모피)
  21. I love this . animation ([명] 만화, 애니메이션)
  22. Be to old people. polite ([형] 예의 바른)
  23. The curry is very . mild ([형] 가벼운, 온화한)
  24. It is my here. duty ([명] 의무, 직무)
DAY 22
반의어 고르기Choose the Antonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. polite ([형] 예의 바른)
    ① be covered with② rude③ try one's best④ hand out
  2. forward ([부] 앞쪽으로)
    ① footprint② animation③ backward④ hand out
  3. relax ([동] 쉬다, 긴장을 풀다)
    ① work② against③ seafood④ absent
  4. mild ([형] 가벼운, 온화한)
    ① fur② seafood③ be covered with④ strong
  5. gorgeous ([형] 멋진, 우아한)
    ① hand out② ugly③ modern④ mild
  6. absent ([형] 결석한)
    ① link② present③ relax④ fur
  7. following ([형] 다음의)
    ① instrument② be covered with③ impression④ past
  8. defend ([동] 방어하다, 지키다)
    ① forward② charge③ fur④ attack
  9. modern ([형] 현대의)
    ① seem② old③ relax④ prove

  3. duty ([명] 의무, 직무)
    ① animation② against③ seafood④ job
  4. relax ([동] 쉬다, 긴장을 풀다)
    ① instrument② forward③ absent④ rest
  5. gorgeous ([형] 멋진, 우아한)
    ① prove② absent③ relax④ beautiful
  6. fur ([명] 털, 모피)
    ① gorgeous② hair③ forward④ link
  7. instrument ([명] 도구, 악기)
    ① tool② polite③ defend④ mild
  8. mild ([형] 가벼운, 온화한)
    ① following② footprint③ soft④ be covered with
  9. following ([형] 다음의)
    ① next② hand out③ try one's best④ footprint

    ① feeling② be covered with③ against④ modern

    ① give② gorgeous③ footprint④ mild

    ① relax② polite③ protect④ following

    ① mild② try one's best③ seem④ price

    ① new② seem③ gorgeous④ animation
  16. forward ([부] 앞쪽으로)
    ① seem② hand out③ ahead④ gorgeous
  17. animation ([명] 만화, 애니메이션)
    ① cartoon② seem③ polite④ seafood
  18. link ([동] 연결하다)
    ① absent② connect③ gorgeous④ fur
DAY 23
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 shoot [동] 쏘다, 슛하다 Shoot the ball now. - -
2 rival [명] 경쟁자 He is my sport rival. friend enemy
3 decision [명] 결정 Make a quick decision. - choice
4 cancel [동] 취소하다 I cancel my plan. start stop
5 bump [동] 부딪치다 Don't bump into me. - hit
6 throat [명] 목구멍 I have a sore throat. - -
7 golden [형] 금색의 The sun is golden. - gold
8 swimsuit [명] 수영복 Put on your swimsuit. - -
9 examination [명] 시험, 조사 I have a big examination. - test
10 passion [명] 열정 He has passion for art. - -
11 wheel [명] 바퀴 The wheel is spinning. - -
12 poem [명] 시 Write a beautiful poem. - song
13 electric [형] 전기의 Use the electric fan. - -
14 pole [명] 막대기, 극 The flag is on pole. - stick
15 birth [명] 탄생 Happy birth day to you. death start
16 possible [형] 가능한 It is possible to win. impossible -
17 brick [명] 벽돌 The house is made of brick. - -
18 chase [동] 뒤쫓다 Dogs chase cats. - follow
19 smooth [형] 매끈한 This paper is very smooth. rough soft
20 fashionable [형] 유행하는 You wear fashionable clothes. old stylish
21 human [명] 인간 Every human needs water. - person
22 for the first time 처음으로 I saw snow for the first time. - -
23 ask for ~을 요청하다 Ask for some help. - want
24 put off 미루다 Do not put off work. - delay

DAY 24
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 neighborhood [명] 동네, 이웃 I live in this neighborhood. - area
2 therefore [부] 그러므로 It rained, therefore I stayed. - so
3 skin [명] 피부 Sun is hot on my skin. - -
4 divide [동] 나누다 Divide the cake into four. join split
5 target [명] 목표, 표적 Hit the center of target. - goal
6 edge [명] 가장자리 Do not stand on the edge. center side
7 trust [명] 신뢰 [동] 믿다 I trust my best friend. doubt believe
8 closely [부] 자세히, 밀접하게 Look at the bug closely. far near
9 speed [명] 속도 The car has high speed. - pace
10 port [명] 항구 The ship is in port. - harbor
11 track [명] 길, 자취 Follow the tiger's track. - path
12 choice [명] 선택 You made a good choice. - pick
13 gradually [부] 서서히 The sky grew dark gradually. suddenly slowly
14 peel [동] 껍질을 벗기다 Peel the orange for me. - skin
15 educate [동] 교육하다 We must educate our kids. - teach
16 quietly [부] 조용히 Please sit down quietly. loudly silently
17 beside [전] ~ 옆에 Sit beside me, please. - next to
18 unfortunately [부] 불행하게도 Unfortunately, I lost my bag. luckily unluckily
19 clearly [부] 명백하게, 또렷하게 I can see it clearly. - plainly
20 repeat [동] 반복하다 Repeat the words after me. - copy
21 switch [명] 스위치 [동] 바꾸다 Turn off the light switch. - change
22 day by day 나날이 I get taller day by day. - daily
23 turn into ~로 바꾸다 Water can turn into ice. - become
24 roll away 흘러가 버리다 The ball did roll away. - go

DAY 24
동의어 고르기Choose the Synonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 동의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. unfortunately ([부] 불행하게도)
    ① beside② port③ peel④ unluckily
  2. therefore ([부] 그러므로)
    ① beside② choice③ so④ closely
  3. peel ([동] 껍질을 벗기다)
    ① skin② clearly③ speed④ repeat
  4. port ([명] 항구)
    ① closely② neighborhood③ speed④ harbor
  5. quietly ([부] 조용히)
    ① track② day by day③ therefore④ silently
  6. repeat ([동] 반복하다)
    ① port② copy③ gradually④ switch
  7. beside ([전] ~ 옆에)
    ① next to② edge③ skin④ turn into
  8. neighborhood ([명] 동네, 이웃)
    ① area② divide③ quietly④ switch
  9. choice ([명] 선택)
    ① gradually② pick③ track④ clearly
  10. turn into (~로 바꾸다)
    ① switch② become③ port④ quietly
  11. roll away (흘러가 버리다)
    ① edge② day by day③ skin④ go
  12. speed ([명] 속도)
    ① pace② therefore③ turn into④ trust
  13. switch ([명] 스위치 [동] 바꾸다)
    ① quietly② turn into③ change④ port
  14. gradually ([부] 서서히)
    ① closely② educate③ slowly④ trust
  15. trust ([명] 신뢰 [동] 믿다)
    ① track② port③ believe④ unfortunately
  16. closely ([부] 자세히, 밀접하게)
    ① near② repeat③ target④ divide
  17. track ([명] 길, 자취)
    ① choice② gradually③ closely④ path
  18. divide ([동] 나누다)
    ① split② roll away③ skin④ clearly
  19. clearly ([부] 명백하게, 또렷하게)
    ① repeat② therefore③ plainly④ speed
  20. educate ([동] 교육하다)
    ① teach② target③ gradually④ divide
  21. edge ([명] 가장자리)
    ① closely② side③ port④ educate
  22. target ([명] 목표, 표적)
    ① port② choice③ goal④ divide
  23. day by day (나날이)
    ① choice② closely③ daily④ neighborhood
DAY 25
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 goods [명] 상품, 제품 These goods are very cheap. - items
2 announce [동] 발표하다, 알리다 Announce the winner now. - tell
3 impossible [형] 불가능한 It is impossible to fly. possible -
4 public [형] 대중의, 공공의 I like the public park. private social
5 ancient [형] 고대의 I like ancient history. modern very old
6 storm [명] 폭풍 A big storm is coming. - -
7 wire [명] 철사, 전선 Do not touch the wire. - line
8 landmark [명] 랜드마크 N-Tower is a landmark. - -
9 introduce [동] 소개하다 Introduce your friend to me. - show
10 poetry [명] 시 I love reading poetry. - poem
11 dust [명] 먼지 Wipe the dust off desk. clean dirt
12 wave [명] 파도 [동] 흔들다 The wave is very high. - -
13 nor [접] ~도 아니다 I cannot sing nor dance. - -
14 chemical [형] 화학의 Water is a chemical thing. - -
15 fake [형] 가짜의 This is a fake flower. real not real
16 rapidly [부] 빨리 The city is growing rapidly. slowly quickly
17 electricity [명] 전기 We need electricity for TV. - power
18 garage [명] 차고 Put the car in garage. - -
19 plain [명] 평원 [형] 분명한 The dress is very plain. fancy clear
20 bother [동] 귀찮게 하다 Do not bother your cat. - tease
21 victory [명] 승리 We celebrate our victory. loss win
22 check out ~을 보다, 확인하다 Check out this cool book. - look at
23 more and more 점점 더 많이 I like you more and more. - -
24 get together 모이다 Let's get together today. - meet

No.단어의미예문반의어동의어

2 accent [명] 말투, 악센트 He has a strong accent. - -
3 forever [부] 영원히 I will love you forever. - -
4 handle [명] 손잡이 [동] 처리하다 Pull the door handle. - -
5 lastly [부] 끝으로 Lastly, wash your hands. first finally
6 site [명] 현장, 부지 This is a building site. - place
7 condition [명] 상태, 조건 The car is in good condition. - state
8 doubt [동] 의심하다 I doubt his story. trust -
9 youth [명] 어린 시절, 젊음 Enjoy your youth. - -
10 monster [명] 괴물 I am afraid of monster. - giant
11 chart [명] 도표 Look at the weather chart. - map
12 task [명] 일, 과업 Finish your task now. - job
13 circus [명] 서커스 Let's go to the circus. - -
14 apart [부] 떨어져 The two houses are apart. together away
15 balance [명] 균형 Keep your balance on ice. - -
16 damp [형] 축축한 My clothes are still damp. dry wet
17 celebrate [동] 축하하다 Celebrate your birthday today. - -
18 triangle [명] 삼각형 Draw a small triangle. - -
19 soul [명] 영혼 Music is good for soul. - -
20 instead [부] 그 대신에 I want milk instead. - -
21 fear [명] 공포 [동] 두려워하다 Do not fear the dark. - dread
22 run away 달아나다 The bird did run away. stay escape
23 at the same time 동시에 They jumped at the same time. - at once
24 talk to oneself 혼잣말하다 She likes to talk to herself. - -

    ① accent② state③ damp④ monster

  3. monster ([명] 괴물)
    ① damp② apart③ condition④ giant
  4. site ([명] 현장, 부지)
    ① salty② at the same time③ place④ circus
  5. lastly ([부] 끝으로)
    ① celebrate② finally③ monster④ chart
  6. apart ([부] 떨어져)
    ① lastly② condition③ chart④ away
  7. task ([명] 일, 과업)
    ① lastly② monster③ apart④ job
  8. run away (달아나다)
    ① escape② chart③ lastly④ instead
  9. fear ([명] 공포 [동] 두려워하다)
    ① task② lastly③ dread④ accent
  10. damp ([형] 축축한)
    ① handle② celebrate③ wet④ balance
  11. chart ([명] 도표)
    ① map② forever③ soul④ task
DAY 27
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 recent [형] 최근의 This is recent news. old new
2 propose [동] 제안하다 [동] 청혼하다 I propose a new plan. - suggest
3 belong [동] 속하다 This book belongs to me. - -
4 injury [명] 부상 He has a knee injury. - wound
5 select [동] 선택하다 Select your favorite color. - choose
6 bitter [형] 쓴 [형] 쓰라린 This coffee is very bitter. sweet -
7 haircut [명] 이발, 머리 자르기 I need a haircut today. - -
8 net [명] 그물 [형] 순수한 Catch fish with a net. - -
9 screen [명] 화면 [동] 상영하다 Look at the screen now. - -
10 shore [명] 해안 We walked along the shore. - coast
11 wavy [형] 물결 모양의 She has wavy hair. straight -
12 downtown [명] 시내 [형] 시내의 Let's go downtown today. - -
13 address [명] 주소 [동] 연설하다 Write your home address here. - -
14 offer [동] 제공하다 [명] 제안 They offer free coffee. - give
15 cancer [명] 암 Smoking can cause cancer. - -
16 fold [동] 접다 Fold the paper in half. unfold -
17 southern [형] 남쪽의 They live in a southern city. northern -
18 private [형] 사적인 [형] 사립의 This is a private room. public -
19 crime [명] 범죄 Stealing is a crime. - -
20 surface [명] 표면 The surface is very smooth. - -
21 origin [명] 기원, 출신 I do not know its origin. - -
22 fill out 작성하다 Fill out this form, please. - -
23 more than ~보다 많은 I have more than ten pens. less than -
24 make a living 생계를 꾸리다 They make a living by fishing. - -

DAY 28
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 major [형] 주요한 [명] 전공 [동] 전공하다 This is a major problem. minor main
2 appear [동] 나타나다 A star will appear soon. disappear -
3 muscle [명] 근육 He has strong muscles. - -
4 slice [명] 조각 [동] 얇게 썰다 I ate a slice of pizza. - piece
5 pattern [명] 패턴, 무늬 I like this flower pattern. - design
6 respect [명] 존경 [동] 존경하다 We respect our teachers. - honor
7 entrance [명] 입구 Meet me at the entrance. exit gate
8 cycle [명] 순환, 주기 The water cycle is important. - -
9 happen [동] 일어나다, 발생하다 Accidents can happen anywhere. - occur
10 visitor [명] 방문객 We have a visitor today. host guest
11 theme [명] 주제 The theme is friendship. - subject
12 unit [명] 단위, 단원 Study unit five today. - -
13 degree [명] 도, 학위 It is thirty degrees today. - -
14 confident [형] 자신감 있는 She is confident and calm. nervous sure
15 bend [동] 구부리다 Bend your knees slowly. - -
16 asleep [형] 잠든 The baby is asleep now. awake sleeping
17 attend [동] 참석하다, 다니다 I will attend the meeting. - -
18 destroy [동] 파괴하다 Fire can destroy a house. build ruin
19 powder [명] 가루, 분말 Add some milk powder. - -
20 emotion [명] 감정 Love is a strong emotion. - feeling
21 reason [명] 이유 Tell me the reason why. - cause
22 as well 또한, ~도 I want juice as well. - too
23 hand in 제출하다 Hand in your homework now. - submit
24 believe in ~을 믿다 I believe in myself. doubt trust
