학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 awful [형] 끔찍한 [부] 매우 The weather is awful today. great terrible
2 spin [동] 돌다, 회전하다 [명] 회전 The wheels spin fast. - turn
3 guest [명] 손님, 게스트 We have a guest tonight. host visitor
4 candle [명] 양초 Light the birthday candle. - -
5 express [동] 표현하다 [형] 급행의 Express your true feelings. - show
6 beg [동] 간청하다, 구걸하다 I beg you for help. - -
7 fabric [명] 천, 직물 This fabric is very soft. - cloth
8 customer [명] 고객, 손님 The customer is always right. seller buyer
9 curiosity [명] 호기심 Cats are full of curiosity. - -
10 pump [동] 펌프질하다 [명] 펌프 Pump some air into the tire. - -
11 worth [형] ~의 가치가 있는 [명] 가치 This ring is worth a lot. - value
12 trick [명] 속임수, 마술 [동] 속이다 The magician did a trick. - -
13 detail [명] 세부 사항 [동] 자세히 설명하다 Explain every small detail. - -
14 provide [동] 제공하다 We provide free lunch. - give
15 remind [동] 상기시키다 Please remind me later. - -
16 expect [동] 기대하다, 예상하다 I expect good news soon. - -
17 disappear [동] 사라지다 The sun will disappear soon. appear -
18 plenty [명] 풍부함, 많음 [형] 충분한 We have plenty of time. - enough
19 remember [동] 기억하다 I remember your name. forget -
20 curious [형] 호기심이 많은 The curious boy asked questions. - -
21 schoolwork [명] 학교 공부, 과제 Finish your schoolwork first. - -
22 take place 일어나다, 개최되다 The party will take place here. - happen
23 instead of ~ 대신에 Drink water instead of soda. - -
24 for a while 잠시 동안 Wait here for a while. - -

DAY 30
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 steal [동] 훔치다, 도둑질하다 Do not steal from others. give take
2 feed [동] 먹이[모이]를 주다 Feed the dog every morning. - give food
3 pile [명] 쌓아 놓은 것 [동] 쌓다 There is a pile of books. - stack
4 similar [형] 비슷한, 유사한 They look very similar. different alike
5 escape [동] 탈출하다 [명] 탈출 The bird did escape. stay run away
6 disappoint [동] 실망시키다 Do not disappoint your mom. please upset
7 navy [명] 해군 He joined the navy. - -
8 spirit [명] 마음, 정신, 영혼 Keep a strong spirit. body mind
9 overcome [동] 극복하다, 이겨내다 Overcome your fear. lose beat
10 anyway [부] 어쨌든 It is raining, but go anyway. - -
11 found [동] 설립하다 They found a new school. - start
12 international [형] 국제적인 It is an international game. local global
13 army [명] 군대, 육군 He is in the army. - soldiers
14 shock [명] 충격 [동] 충격을 주다 The news gave me a shock. - surprise
15 cell [명] 세포 Look at the plant cell. - -
16 scream [동] 비명을 지르다 Do not scream in class. - yell
17 brain [명] 뇌, 지능 Use your brain to think. - mind
18 disease [명] 병, 질병 This disease is very rare. health sickness
19 gesture [명] 몸짓, 제스처 Use a hand gesture. - move
20 original [형] 원래의, 독창적인 This is the original art. copy first
21 violent [형] 난폭한, 폭력적인 Do not watch violent movies. gentle rough
22 end up with 결국 ...하게 되다 You will end up with joy. - -
23 would like to ...하고 싶다 I would like to eat. - want to
24 drop by 잠시 들르다 Please drop by my office. - visit

    ① yell② disease③ gesture④ escape
  3. brain ([명] 뇌, 지능)
    ① pile② army③ mind④ cell
  4. spirit ([명] 마음, 정신, 영혼)
    ① steal② disappoint③ cell④ mind
  5. gesture ([명] 몸짓, 제스처)
    ① move② violent③ spirit④ steal
  6. disappoint ([동] 실망시키다)
    ① original② steal③ upset④ international
  7. army ([명] 군대, 육군)
    ① would like to② disappoint③ spirit④ soldiers
  8. found ([동] 설립하다)
    ① spirit② start③ disease④ end up with
  9. similar ([형] 비슷한, 유사한)
    ① disappoint② end up with③ navy④ alike
  10. disease ([명] 병, 질병)
    ① sickness② cell③ original④ brain
  11. international ([형] 국제적인)
    ① violent② army③ would like to④ global
  12. drop by (잠시 들르다)
    ① visit② would like to③ brain④ violent
  13. pile ([명] 쌓아 놓은 것 [동] 쌓다)
    ① found② stack③ similar④ original
  14. overcome ([동] 극복하다, 이겨내다)
    ① beat② disappoint③ disease④ original
  15. feed ([동] 먹이[모이]를 주다)
    ① anyway② give food③ gesture④ escape
  16. escape ([동] 탈출하다 [명] 탈출)
    ① run away② navy③ scream④ cell
  17. shock ([명] 충격 [동] 충격을 주다)
    ① end up with② violent③ found④ surprise
  18. steal ([동] 훔치다, 도둑질하다)
    ① take② international③ navy④ would like to
  19. would like to (...하고 싶다)
    ① want to② steal③ feed④ overcome
  20. original ([형] 원래의, 독창적인)
    ① escape② first③ violent④ cell
DAY 31
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 locker 사물함 Put your bag in the locker. - cabinet
2 athlete 운동선수 He is a great athlete. - player
3 such 그러한, 매우 I like such a nice day. - so
4 article 기사, 글 Read this news article. - story
5 capital 수도, 대문자 Seoul is the capital. - -
6 northern 북쪽의 It is in the northern part. southern north
7 explain 설명하다 Can you explain this? - tell
8 forget 잊다 Don't forget my name. remember -
9 manner 방식, 예절 He has a good manner. - way
10 tune 곡조, 조율하다 I like this happy tune. - song
11 sticky 끈적거리는 The honey is very sticky. - -
12 perhaps 아마도 Perhaps it will rain. - maybe
13 sense 감각, 느낌 Use your five senses. - feel
14 booth 부스, 작은 공간 Go to the photo booth. - stall
15 conduct 수행하다, 지휘하다 He will conduct the show. - do
16 fault 잘못, 결점 It is not my fault. - mistake
17 disappointed 실망한 I am disappointed in you. happy sad
18 ladder 사다리 Use a ladder to go up. - -
19 comfort 편안함, 위로 I feel comfort at home. - peace
20 heal 낫다, 치유하다 The wound will heal soon. hurt cure
21 difference 차이 What is the difference? same -
22 in need 어려움에 처한 Help people in need. - -
23 come across 우연히 마주치다 I came across my friend. - meet
24 all the time 항상, 늘 He smiles all the time. - always
DAY 31
쓰기 연습Write & Remember
학습한 날짜 :

뜻과 단어를 확인하고, 오른쪽 줄에 영어 단어를 3번 따라 쓰세요. 따라 쓸 때는 반드시 큰 소리로 단어를 읽으세요.

No.단어뜻3번 쓰기
1 fault 잘못, 결점
2 perhaps 아마도
3 conduct 수행하다, 지휘하다
4 sense 감각, 느낌
5 come across 우연히 마주치다
6 article 기사, 글
7 comfort 편안함, 위로
8 in need 어려움에 처한
9 heal 낫다, 치유하다
10 sticky 끈적거리는
11 booth 부스, 작은 공간
12 ladder 사다리
13 such 그러한, 매우
14 all the time 항상, 늘
15 disappointed 실망한
16 explain 설명하다
17 capital 수도, 대문자
18 northern 북쪽의
19 difference 차이
20 athlete 운동선수
21 manner 방식, 예절
22 tune 곡조, 조율하다
23 forget 잊다
24 locker 사물함

단어는 뜻을, 뜻은 단어를 쓰세요.

1 remember [동] 기억하다
2 pump [동] 펌프질하다 [명] 펌프
3 [형] 끔찍한 [부] 매우 awful
4 instead of ~ 대신에
5 잠시 동안 for a while
6 fabric [명] 천, 직물
7 [명] 호기심 curiosity
8 [명] 풍부함, 많음 [형] 충분한 plenty
9 beg [동] 간청하다, 구걸하다
10 trick [명] 속임수, 마술 [동] 속이다
11 [동] 표현하다 [형] 급행의 express
12 [형] ~의 가치가 있는 [명] 가치 worth
13 [동] 제공하다 provide
14 expect [동] 기대하다, 예상하다
15 [명] 학교 공부, 과제 schoolwork
16 [동] 돌다, 회전하다 [명] 회전 spin
17 [동] 상기시키다 remind
18 [명] 고객, 손님 customer
19 [명] 양초 candle
20 일어나다, 개최되다 take place
21 [형] 호기심이 많은 curious
22 [명] 세부 사항 [동] 자세히 설명하다 detail
23 [동] 사라지다 disappear
24 [명] 손님, 게스트 guest

conductforgetstickydifferencecapitalperhapsin needsuchboothdisappointedsensefaultmannerexplaincomfortcome acrossnorthernarticleathleteladderall the timelockerhealtune
  1. The honey is very . sticky (끈적거리는)
  2. Don't my name. forget (잊다)
  3. He is a great . athlete (운동선수)
  4. The wound will soon. heal (낫다, 치유하다)
  5. it will rain. perhaps (아마도)
  6. I am in you. disappointed (실망한)
  7. I came across my friend. ( ) come across (우연히 마주치다)
  8. Put your bag in the . locker (사물함)
  9. Can you this? explain (설명하다)
  10. Use your five s. sense (감각, 느낌)
  11. He smiles . all the time (항상, 늘)
  12. He will the show. conduct (수행하다, 지휘하다)
  13. Seoul is the . capital (수도, 대문자)
  14. Read this news . article (기사, 글)
  15. Go to the photo . booth (부스, 작은 공간)
  16. I like this happy . tune (곡조, 조율하다)
  17. It is in the part. northern (북쪽의)
  18. What is the ? difference (차이)
  19. Use a to go up. ladder (사다리)
  20. He has a good . manner (방식, 예절)
  21. Help people . in need (어려움에 처한)
  22. I feel at home. comfort (편안함, 위로)
  23. It is not my . fault (잘못, 결점)
  24. I like a nice day. such (그러한, 매우)

DAY 32
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 guard 경비원, 지키다 The guard is at the gate. - keeper
2 manage 경영하다, 관리하다 Can you manage the team? - run
3 remain 여전히 ...이다 Please remain quiet. - stay
4 exchange 교환하다 Let's exchange our gifts. - trade
5 castle 성 The princess lives in a castle. - -
6 argue 논쟁하다 Don't argue with him. agree fight
7 pillow 베개 I need a soft pillow. - -
8 tomb 무덤 They found an old tomb. - grave
9 sight 시력, 보기 The sight is beautiful. - view
10 amount 양, 액수 A small amount of water. - sum
11 appearance 외모, 등장 He cares about appearance. - look
12 bold 대담한, 용감한 She is a bold girl. shy brave
13 community 지역사회 Our community is kind. - town
14 diet 식사, 다이어트 I am on a healthy diet. - food
15 explore 탐험하다 Let's explore the woods. - travel
16 grain 곡물, 알갱이 Rice is a kind of grain. - seed
17 represent 대표하다 Red can represent love. - stand for
18 wealth 부, 재산 Health is better than wealth. poverty riches
19 loss 분실, 손해 The loss of the bag is sad. gain -
20 notice 알아차리다 Did you notice the sign? - see
21 poison 독 The snake has poison. - -
22 set up 세우다, 설치하다 Set up the tent here. - build
23 ahead of ...앞에 Go ahead of me. behind before
24 in short 요약하면 In short, it was fun. - -

    ① argue② bold③ castle④ seed
  14. bold (대담한, 용감한)
    ① wealth② castle③ brave④ sight
  15. guard (경비원, 지키다)
    ① keeper② bold③ argue④ manage
  16. community (지역사회)
    ① grain② town③ wealth④ guard
  17. remain (여전히 ...이다)
    ① stay② community③ amount④ pillow
  18. argue (논쟁하다)
    ① castle② fight③ sight④ appearance
  19. manage (경영하다, 관리하다)
    ① exchange② appearance③ castle④ run
DAY 33
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 series 연속, 시리즈 I like this TV series. - sequence
2 terrible 끔찍한 The smell is terrible. great awful
3 tribe 종족, 부족 This is a small tribe. - group
4 solution 해결책 I found the solution. - answer
5 cage 우리, 새장 The lion is in the cage. - -
6 familiar 익숙한 The face is familiar. strange known
7 honor 명예, 영광 It is a great honor. - glory
8 campaign 운동, 캠페인 A clean park campaign. - drive
9 information 정보 Give me some information. - news
10 pollute 오염시키다 Don't pollute the river. clean dirty
11 delight 기쁨 To my delight, I won. sadness joy
12 cable 전선, 케이블 Connect the TV cable. - wire
13 value 가치 The ring has great value. - worth
14 supply 공급하다, 물자 They supply fresh food. - give
15 memory 기억, 추억 I have a good memory. - mind
16 university 대학교 He goes to a university. - college
17 pipe 관, 파이프 Water flows in the pipe. - tube
18 volunteer 자원봉사자 She is a school volunteer. - -
19 spill 쏟다, 흘리다 Don't spill your juice. - -
20 physical 신체의, 물리적인 Do some physical exercise. mental body
21 zone 구역 This is a safety zone. - area
22 be filled with ...로 가득 차다 The box is filled with toys. - full of
23 on one's way ...로 가는 도중에 I am on my way home. - -
24 turn off (전기를) 끄다 Turn off the light. turn on switch off

DAY 34
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 newborn 갓 태어난 Look at the newborn baby. old baby
2 document 서류, 문서 I lost the important document. - paper
3 steel 강철 The bridge is made of steel. - iron
4 lean 기울이다, 기대다 Do not lean on the wall. - bend
5 cast 던지다, 캐스팅하다 Cast the net into the sea. - throw
6 limit 한계, 제한하다 Set a limit for the game. - end
7 bloom 꽃이 피다 Flowers bloom in the spring. - flower
8 research 연구, 조사하다 I need to do some research. - study
9 apology 사과 Accept my sincere apology. - sorry
10 chemistry 화학 I like the chemistry class. - -
11 silly 어리석은 Do not make a silly mistake. smart foolish
12 ease 쉬움, 편해지다 He did it with ease. - comfort
13 force 힘, 강요하다 Use force to open the door. - power
14 average 평균, 보통의 He is an average student. special normal
15 relationship 관계 We have a good relationship. - bond
16 include 포함하다 Does the price include milk? exclude add
17 smoke 연기, 담배 피우다 Smoke came out of the fire. - -
18 kindness 친절 Thank you for your kindness. - love
19 growth 성장, 증가 Look at the plant's growth. - increase
20 click 클릭하다 Click the red button now. - press
21 souvenir 기념품 I bought a small souvenir. - gift
22 cut down 줄이다, 베다 Cut down on sweet food. increase reduce
23 be familiar with ~에 익숙하다 I am familiar with this place. - know
24 turn down 낮추다, 거절하다 Turn down the TV sound. turn up lower

DAY 35
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 fame 명성, 명예 He won fame as a singer. - glory
2 object 물건, 목표 What is that red object? - thing
3 stare 빤히 쳐다보다 Do not stare at people. - look
4 college 대학 My sister goes to college. - school
5 probably 아마도 I will probably go home. - maybe
6 debt 빚 I paid off my debt. - -
7 experience 경험 Travel is a good experience. - -
8 bacteria 박테리아, 세균 Wash hands to kill bacteria. - germ
9 appropriate 적절한 Wear an appropriate hat. - fit
10 comment 의견, 논평하다 Leave a comment below. - remark
11 comfortable 편안한 This sofa is very comfortable. uneasy cozy
12 education 교육 Education is very important. - teaching
13 schedule 일정, 시간표 Check your school schedule. - plan
14 magnet 자석 The magnet pulls the nail. - -
15 wool 털, 털실 This scarf is made of wool. - fur
16 wisdom 지혜 He is a man of wisdom. - mind
17 afterward 후에, 나중에 We ate lunch afterward. before later
18 slip 미끄러지다 Be careful not to slip. - fall
19 damage 손상을 입히다 The storm did some damage. fix hurt
20 spell 철자를 쓰다 Can you spell your name? - -
21 jaw 턱 My jaw hurts a bit. - -
22 hang on 기다리다, 붙잡다 Hang on for a moment. - wait
23 get used to ~에 익숙해지다 I get used to this. - learn
24 team up 팀을 이루다 Let's team up with Sam. - join
DAY 35
쓰기 연습Write & Remember
학습한 날짜 :

뜻과 단어를 확인하고, 오른쪽 줄에 영어 단어를 3번 따라 쓰세요. 따라 쓸 때는 반드시 큰 소리로 단어를 읽으세요.

No.단어뜻3번 쓰기
1 jaw 턱
2 schedule 일정, 시간표
3 fame 명성, 명예
4 spell 철자를 쓰다
5 hang on 기다리다, 붙잡다
6 appropriate 적절한
7 debt 빚
8 experience 경험
9 education 교육
10 comment 의견, 논평하다
11 college 대학
12 get used to ~에 익숙해지다
13 wisdom 지혜
14 team up 팀을 이루다
15 object 물건, 목표
16 comfortable 편안한
17 magnet 자석
18 probably 아마도
19 bacteria 박테리아, 세균
20 afterward 후에, 나중에
21 slip 미끄러지다
22 stare 빤히 쳐다보다
23 wool 털, 털실
24 damage 손상을 입히다

12 대학교 university

20 익숙한 familiar

24 be filled with ...로 가득 차다
DAY 35
누적 복습 시험 · DAY 34Review Test

단어는 뜻을, 뜻은 단어를 쓰세요.

2 force 힘, 강요하다
3 평균, 보통의 average
4 꽃이 피다 bloom
5 smoke 연기, 담배 피우다
6 화학 chemistry
7 cut down 줄이다, 베다
8 기울이다, 기대다 lean
9 낮추다, 거절하다 turn down
10 cast 던지다, 캐스팅하다
11 연구, 조사하다 research
12 souvenir 기념품
13 document 서류, 문서
14 click 클릭하다
15 steel 강철
16 갓 태어난 newborn
17 silly 어리석은
18 relationship 관계
19 limit 한계, 제한하다
20 성장, 증가 growth
21 쉬움, 편해지다 ease
22 포함하다 include
23 ~에 익숙하다 be familiar with
24 친절 kindness
DAY 35
예문 빈칸 채우기Fill in the Blank
학습한 날짜 :

뜻을 참고하여 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 단어 은행에서 골라 쓰세요.

afterwardcomfortableslipwoolmagnetprobablyobjectcommentscheduleeducationspellexperiencestaredebtfamejawget used tocollegehang onappropriateteam updamagewisdombacteria
  1. What is that red ? object (물건, 목표)
  2. My hurts a bit. jaw (턱)
  3. Can you your name? spell (철자를 쓰다)
  4. The storm did some . damage (손상을 입히다)
  5. Travel is a good . experience (경험)
  6. We ate lunch . afterward (후에, 나중에)
  7. Let's with Sam. team up (팀을 이루다)
  8. Be careful not to . slip (미끄러지다)
  9. He won as a singer. fame (명성, 명예)
  10. is very important. education (교육)
  11. I will go home. probably (아마도)
  12. Check your school . schedule (일정, 시간표)
  13. I paid off my . debt (빚)
  14. This sofa is very . comfortable (편안한)
  15. He is a man of . wisdom (지혜)
  16. I this. get used to (~에 익숙해지다)
  17. Leave a below. comment (의견, 논평하다)
  18. This scarf is made of . wool (털, 털실)
  19. My sister goes to . college (대학)
  20. for a moment. hang on (기다리다, 붙잡다)
  21. Do not at people. stare (빤히 쳐다보다)
  22. The pulls the nail. magnet (자석)
  23. Wear an hat. appropriate (적절한)
  24. Wash hands to kill . bacteria (박테리아, 세균)

  8. schedule (일정, 시간표)

  9. education (교육)

  10. wool (털, 털실)
    ① slip② fame③ wisdom④ fur
  11. slip (미끄러지다)
    ① appropriate② fall③ get used to④ wisdom
  12. comment (의견, 논평하다)
    ① get used to② comfortable③ spell④ remark
  13. comfortable (편안한)
    ① cozy② spell③ magnet④ bacteria

    ① wisdom② maybe③ stare④ bacteria
DAY 36
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 figure 수치, 인물 She has a nice figure. - number
2 consume 소비하다 We consume a lot of water. save use
3 blame 탓하다 Do not blame your friend. praise -
4 valuable 귀중한 This ring is very valuable. cheap precious
5 closet 벽장, 옷장 Put it in the closet. - cabinet
6 brief 짧은, 간결한 It was a brief meeting. long short
7 gap 틈, 격차 There is a gap here. - space
8 satisfy 만족시키다 This meal did satisfy me. - please
9 realize 깨닫다, 실현하다 I realize the truth now. - know
10 attract 끌어들이다 Flowers attract bees and bugs. - pull
11 tend ~하는 경향이 있다 I tend to eat fast. - -
12 separate 분리된, 나누다 Keep the two books separate. join split
13 proud 자랑스러워하는 I am proud of you. ashamed glad
14 freedom 자유 We all love our freedom. - liberty
15 hardly 거의 ~않다 I can hardly hear you. always rarely
16 discuss 논의하다 Let's discuss the new plan. - talk
17 moonlight 달빛 Walking under the bright moonlight. - -
18 pity 동정, 연민 I felt pity for him. - -
19 scold 꾸짖다 My dad did scold me. praise blame
20 sink 가라앉다, 싱크대 Heavy things sink in water. float -
21 argument 언쟁, 주장 They had a big argument. agreement fight
22 one another 서로 Love one another every day. - each other
23 take part in ~에 참여하다 Take part in the race. - join
24 pull out 빼다, 뽑다 Pull out the old tooth. put in remove

blameproudsatisfyfigureone anothervaluablediscussrealizeargumenttendseparatefreedomattracttake part insinkconsumehardlyclosetbriefgappitymoonlightpull outscold

  15. I to eat fast. tend (~하는 경향이 있다)

  18. She has a nice . figure (수치, 인물)

DAY 37
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 fuel [명] 연료 Cars need fuel to go. - gas
2 spread [동] 펼치다, 퍼뜨리다 Spread the jam on bread. close open
3 analyze [동] 분석하다 Analyze the math problem. - study
4 flash [동] 번쩍이다 Lightning began to flash. - shine
5 improve [동] 개선하다, 향상시키다 I want to improve my English. get worse get better
6 position [명] 위치, 자세 What is your favorite position? - place
7 tease [동] 놀리다, 괴롭히다 Do not tease your friend. - joke
8 exhibition [명] 전시회 We went to an art exhibition. - show
9 wisely [부] 현명하게 Spend your money wisely. foolishly smartly
10 narrow [형] 좁은 The road is very narrow. wide small
11 height [명] 키, 높이 What is your height? - tallness
12 diligent [형] 부지런한 She is a diligent student. lazy hard-working
13 restroom [명] 화장실 Where is the restroom? - bathroom
14 pollution [명] 오염 Air pollution is a problem. - dirt
15 shut [동] 닫다 Please shut the door. open close
16 stretch [동] 늘이다, 뻗다 Stretch your arms up. - extend
17 inform [동] 알리다 Inform me of the time. - tell
18 liberty [명] 자유 We all love liberty. - freedom
19 employ [동] 고용하다 They employ many workers. fire hire
20 benefit [명] 혜택, 이득 Sleep has a great benefit. harm good
21 panic [명] 공포, 공황 Do not panic in danger. calm fear
22 keep in mind 명심하다 Keep in mind my advice. forget remember
23 pull up 멈추다, 서다 The car will pull up. - stop
24 run across 우연히 마주치다 I did run across Tom. - meet

19 shut [동] 닫다
20 pull up 멈추다, 서다
21 position [명] 위치, 자세

단어는 뜻을, 뜻은 단어를 쓰세요.

11 slip 미끄러지다
12 기다리다, 붙잡다 hang on
13 손상을 입히다 damage
14 bacteria 박테리아, 세균
15 경험 experience
16 wisdom 지혜
17 afterward 후에, 나중에
18 ~에 익숙해지다 get used to
19 교육 education
20 빤히 쳐다보다 stare
21 명성, 명예 fame
22 팀을 이루다 team up
23 자석 magnet
24 comfortable 편안한

누적 복습 시험 · DAY 36Review Test
학습한 날짜 :

단어는 뜻을, 뜻은 단어를 쓰세요.

1 gap 틈, 격차
2 satisfy 만족시키다

4 closet 벽장, 옷장
5 끌어들이다 attract
6 proud 자랑스러워하는
7 서로 one another
8 pull out 빼다, 뽑다

10 거의 ~않다 hardly
11 take part in ~에 참여하다
12 소비하다 consume
13 argument 언쟁, 주장
14 자유 freedom
15 탓하다 blame
16 수치, 인물 figure
17 ~하는 경향이 있다 tend
18 짧은, 간결한 brief
19 scold 꾸짖다
20 moonlight 달빛
21 깨닫다, 실현하다 realize
22 discuss 논의하다
23 sink 가라앉다, 싱크대
24 pity 동정, 연민
DAY 37
예문 빈칸 채우기Fill in the Blank
학습한 날짜 :

뜻을 참고하여 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 단어 은행에서 골라 쓰세요.

shutteaseemploykeep in mindpanicrun acrossinformfuelanalyzebenefitflashpositionpollutionimprovepull upstretchlibertynarrowdiligentrestroomspreadwiselyexhibitionheight
  1. Lightning began to . flash ([동] 번쩍이다)
  2. We all love . liberty ([명] 자유)
  3. me of the time. inform ([동] 알리다)
  4. What is your favorite ? position ([명] 위치, 자세)
  5. your arms up. stretch ([동] 늘이다, 뻗다)
  6. Do not in danger. panic ([명] 공포, 공황)
  7. my advice. keep in mind (명심하다)
  8. Sleep has a great . benefit ([명] 혜택, 이득)
  9. Do not your friend. tease ([동] 놀리다, 괴롭히다)
  10. Where is the ? restroom ([명] 화장실)
  11. The car will . pull up (멈추다, 서다)
  12. What is your ? height ([명] 키, 높이)
  13. Air is a problem. pollution ([명] 오염)
  14. We went to an art . exhibition ([명] 전시회)
  15. She is a student. diligent ([형] 부지런한)
  16. I want to my English. improve ([동] 개선하다, 향상시키다)
  17. the math problem. analyze ([동] 분석하다)
  18. They many workers. employ ([동] 고용하다)
  19. the jam on bread. spread ([동] 펼치다, 퍼뜨리다)
  20. The road is very . narrow ([형] 좁은)
  21. I did Tom. run across (우연히 마주치다)
  22. Cars need to go. fuel ([명] 연료)
  23. Spend your money . wisely ([부] 현명하게)
  24. Please the door. shut ([동] 닫다)
DAY 37
반의어 고르기Choose the Antonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. improve ([동] 개선하다, 향상시키다)
    ① get worse② run across③ diligent④ benefit
  2. spread ([동] 펼치다, 퍼뜨리다)
    ① employ② keep in mind③ close④ diligent
  3. benefit ([명] 혜택, 이득)
    ① shut② flash③ harm④ narrow
  4. keep in mind (명심하다)
    ① spread② wisely③ panic④ forget
  5. narrow ([형] 좁은)
    ① wide② keep in mind③ employ④ restroom
  6. wisely ([부] 현명하게)
    ① panic② position③ narrow④ foolishly
  7. diligent ([형] 부지런한)
    ① flash② analyze③ fuel④ lazy
  8. panic ([명] 공포, 공황)
    ① shut② height③ calm④ stretch
  9. employ ([동] 고용하다)
    ① pollution② fire③ inform④ restroom
  10. shut ([동] 닫다)
    ① position② open③ stretch④ analyze

    ① panic② restroom③ inform④ study

    ① run across② gas③ exhibition④ pull up
  13. benefit ([명] 혜택, 이득)
    ① good② pollution③ improve④ spread

    ① tell② run across③ exhibition④ improve
  15. improve ([동] 개선하다, 향상시키다)
    ① spread② employ③ get better④ height

DAY 38
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 compass [명] 나침반 Use a compass in woods. - -
2 deliver [동] 배달하다 They deliver pizza fast. - give
3 earthquake [명] 지진 The earthquake shook the house. - -
4 strength [명] 힘, 강점 He has great body strength. weakness power
5 treasure [명] 보물 The pirates found the treasure. - gold
6 bullet [명] 총알 The bullet hit the target. - -
7 dislike [동] 싫어하다 I dislike cold winter. like hate
8 engineer [명] 기술자 He is a robot engineer. - maker
9 frame [명] 틀, 액자 Put it in the frame. - case
10 astronaut [명] 우주비행사 I want to be an astronaut. - -
11 apologize [동] 사과하다 You should apologize to her. - say sorry
12 several [형] 몇몇의 I have several story books. many some
13 regret [동] 후회하다 Do not regret your choice. - -
14 various [형] 다양한 I have various hobbies. - different
15 bless [동] 축복하다 God bless you today. - -
16 spot [명] 장소, 반점 This is a good spot. - place
17 cotton [명] 면, 목화 This shirt is 100% cotton. - -
18 certainly [부] 확실히 I will certainly be there. maybe surely
19 feather [명] 깃털 The feather is very light. - -
20 touching [형] 감동적인 The movie was very touching. boring sad
21 afford [동] 여유가 있다 I cannot afford this car. - -
22 make it 성공하다, 도착하다 I can make it alone. fail succeed
23 sign up for ~을 신청하다 Sign up for the club. - join
24 such as ~와 같은 I like fruits such as apples. - like

DAY 39
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 horror [명] 공포 I dislike horror movies. - fear
2 climbing [명] 등산 I like climbing mountains. - hiking
3 justice [명] 정의, 공정 Fight for truth and justice. - fairness
4 unlike [전] ~와 다른 He is unlike his brother. like different from
5 state [명] 상태, 주 Water can be in three states. - condition
6 pardon [명] 용서 Pardon me for being late. - excuse
7 heaven [명] 천국 Birds fly up to heaven. hell paradise
8 counsel [동] 상담하다 Teachers counsel many students. - advise
9 purpose [명] 목적 What is your purpose here? - goal
10 nervous [형] 긴장한 I feel nervous about tests. calm anxious
11 canal [명] 운하 The boat is on canal. - -
12 spray [동] 뿌리다 Spray some water on flowers. - -
13 relate [동] 관련시키다 These two ideas relate. - connect
14 vet [명] 수의사 Take the cat to vet. - animal doctor
15 friendship [명] 우정 Our friendship is very strong. - love
16 admire [동] 존경하다 I admire my kind teacher. hate respect
17 delete [동] 삭제하다 Delete the old files now. add remove
18 beneath [전] 아래에 Sit beneath the big tree. above under
19 describe [동] 묘사하다 Describe your lost bag. - tell
20 reflect [동] 비추다 Mirrors reflect your face. - mirror
21 citizen [명] 시민 I am a Korean citizen. - -
22 give away 폭로하다, 공짜로 주다 Do not give away secrets. - gift
23 put up 올리다, 세우다 Put up your hands now. - raise
24 be related to ~와 관계가 있다 Health is related to food. - connect

DAY 39

학습한 날짜 :

뜻을 참고하여 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 단어 은행에서 골라 쓰세요.

vetreflectpurposebeneathrelatejusticebe related todescribedeletecitizenfriendshipstateclimbinggive awaynervouspardonput uphorrorheavenadmirespraycanalcounselunlike
  1. Our is very strong. friendship ([명] 우정)
  2. I am a Korean . citizen ([명] 시민)
  3. I like mountains. climbing ([명] 등산)
  4. What is your here? purpose ([명] 목적)
  5. some water on flowers. spray ([동] 뿌리다)
  6. He is his brother. unlike ([전] ~와 다른)
  7. Do not secrets. give away (폭로하다, 공짜로 주다)
  8. I dislike movies. horror ([명] 공포)
  9. the old files now. delete ([동] 삭제하다)
  10. your hands now. put up (올리다, 세우다)
  11. Water can be in three s. state ([명] 상태, 주)
  12. I feel about tests. nervous ([형] 긴장한)
  13. your lost bag. describe ([동] 묘사하다)
  14. Birds fly up to . heaven ([명] 천국)
  15. Take the cat to . vet ([명] 수의사)
  16. These two ideas . relate ([동] 관련시키다)
  17. I my kind teacher. admire ([동] 존경하다)
  18. me for being late. pardon ([명] 용서)
  19. The boat is on . canal ([명] 운하)
  20. Mirrors your face. reflect ([동] 비추다)
  21. Health is related to food. ( ) be related to (~와 관계가 있다)
  22. Sit the big tree. beneath ([전] 아래에)
  23. Fight for truth and . justice ([명] 정의, 공정)
  24. Teachers many students. counsel ([동] 상담하다)

    ① admire② beneath③ excuse④ citizen

  6. friendship ([명] 우정)

  7. give away (폭로하다, 공짜로 주다)
    ① canal② pardon③ delete④ gift
  8. heaven ([명] 천국)
    ① pardon② friendship③ nervous④ paradise
  9. counsel ([동] 상담하다)
    ① canal② climbing③ beneath④ advise
  10. reflect ([동] 비추다)
    ① mirror② give away③ counsel④ climbing
  11. beneath ([전] 아래에)
    ① canal② under③ give away④ pardon

    ① put up② admire③ justice④ connect
  13. delete ([동] 삭제하다)
    ① vet② purpose③ remove④ be related to

    ① unlike② justice③ tell④ friendship

    ① admire② climbing③ connect④ give away

    ① give away② purpose③ raise④ justice

    ① condition② describe③ friendship④ purpose

    ① state② goal③ climbing④ relate
  19. unlike ([전] ~와 다른)
    ① be related to② describe③ admire④ different from

    ① respect② reflect③ spray④ horror
  21. nervous ([형] 긴장한)
    ① put up② anxious③ canal④ admire
DAY 40
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 forgive [동] 용서하다 Please forgive my mistake. blame excuse
2 concern [명] 우려, 걱정 Health is my main concern. - worry
3 humble [형] 겸손한 He is a humble man. proud modest
4 extra [형] 추가의 I need an extra pencil. - more
5 delivery [명] 배달 The pizza delivery is fast. - shipping
6 infection [명] 전염, 감염 Wash hands to stop infection. - -
7 photographer [명] 사진작가 The photographer took a picture. - -
8 waste [명] 낭비 [동] 낭비하다 Don't waste your food. save -
9 polar [형] 극지방의 The polar bear is white. - -
10 crowd [명] 군중, 사람들 A big crowd is here. - group
11 evidence [명] 증거 We need some clear evidence. - proof
12 tragedy [명] 비극 The story was a tragedy. comedy -
13 business [명] 사업, 업무 My dad has a business. - work
14 credit [명] 신용, 칭찬 Give credit to the winner. - -
15 spoil [동] 망치다 Do not spoil the soup. fix ruin
16 recommend [동] 추천하다 I recommend this funny book. - suggest
17 reply [명] 대답 [동] 대답하다 Wait for his reply. ask answer
18 advantage [명] 유리한 점, 장점 Speed is a big advantage. disadvantage good point
19 float [동] 뜨다 Wood can float on water. sink swim
20 proper [형] 적절한 Use the proper tools now. wrong right
21 specific [형] 구체적인 Give me a specific plan. - clear
22 give off 내뿜다, 발산하다 Flowers give off sweet smells. - send out
23 work out 운동하다, 잘 풀리다 I work out every morning. - exercise
24 be proud of ~을 자랑스러워하다 My mom is proud of me. ashamed of -

DAY 41
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 champion [명] 우승자 He is a tennis champion. loser winner
2 local [형] 지역의, 현지의 I like local food. foreign -
3 difficulty [명] 어려움 I had difficulty with math. ease trouble
4 suffer [동] 고통받다 He did suffer from cold. - feel pain
5 environment [명] 자연환경 Protect our green environment. - nature
6 narrator [명] 서술자 The narrator tells the story. - -
7 uneasy [형] 불안한, 불편한 I feel uneasy today. calm nervous
8 upon [전] ~ 위에 Once upon a time. under on
9 idiom [명] 관용구, 숙어 "Rain cats and dogs" is an idiom. - -
10 career [명] 직업, 경력 She had a long career. - job
11 mount [동] 오르다, 올라타다 Mount the horse slowly. descend climb
12 string [명] 끈, 줄 Tie it with a string. - line
13 stroke [명] 타격, 뇌졸중 He has a good stroke. - hit
14 supper [명] 간단한 저녁 식사 Let's eat supper now. - dinner
15 riddle [명] 수수께끼 Can you solve this riddle? - puzzle
16 bet [동] 돈을 걸다 I bet ten dollars. - -
17 script [명] 대본 Read the movie script. - -
18 launch [동] 시작하다, 발사하다 Launch the rocket today. stop start
19 distance [명] 거리 What is the distance? - -
20 indicate [동] 나타내다, 가리키다 Signs indicate the way. - show
21 demonstrate [동] 보여주다, 입증하다 Demonstrate how it works. - show
22 use up ~을 다 쓰다 I did use up ink. - -
23 make a decision 결정하다 Make a decision quickly. - decide
24 account for 설명하다 He must account for money. - explain

19 nervous [형] 긴장한
20 [동] 존경하다 admire
21 vet [명] 수의사
22 [명] 용서 pardon
23 [명] 상태, 주 state
24 [동] 묘사하다 describe

학습한 날짜 :

단어는 뜻을, 뜻은 단어를 쓰세요.

1 tragedy [명] 비극
2 specific [형] 구체적인
3 ~을 자랑스러워하다 be proud of

5 business [명] 사업, 업무
6 spoil [동] 망치다
7 [명] 낭비 [동] 낭비하다 waste
8 give off 내뿜다, 발산하다
9 extra [형] 추가의
10 proper [형] 적절한
11 work out 운동하다, 잘 풀리다
12 [명] 유리한 점, 장점 advantage
13 reply [명] 대답 [동] 대답하다
14 forgive [동] 용서하다
15 evidence [명] 증거
16 crowd [명] 군중, 사람들
17 [형] 극지방의 polar
18 [동] 뜨다 float
19 [형] 겸손한 humble
20 concern [명] 우려, 걱정
21 [동] 추천하다 recommend
22 [명] 신용, 칭찬 credit
23 infection [명] 전염, 감염

DAY 41
예문 빈칸 채우기Fill in the Blank
학습한 날짜 :

뜻을 참고하여 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 단어 은행에서 골라 쓰세요.

uneasystringlocalenvironmentupondistancenarratorchampiondemonstratesupperaccount forriddlebetidiommountindicatesufferscriptlaunchuse upmake a decisioncareerdifficultystroke
  1. He is a tennis . champion ([명] 우승자)
  2. Let's eat now. supper ([명] 간단한 저녁 식사)
  3. What is the ? distance ([명] 거리)
  4. the horse slowly. mount ([동] 오르다, 올라타다)
  5. quickly. make a decision (결정하다)
  6. He did from cold. suffer ([동] 고통받다)
  7. the rocket today. launch ([동] 시작하다, 발사하다)
  8. He must money. account for (설명하다)
  9. Tie it with a . string ([명] 끈, 줄)
  10. Signs the way. indicate ([동] 나타내다, 가리키다)
  11. I ten dollars. bet ([동] 돈을 걸다)
  12. He has a good . stroke ([명] 타격, 뇌졸중)
  13. I had with math. difficulty ([명] 어려움)
  14. Read the movie . script ([명] 대본)
  15. how it works. demonstrate ([동] 보여주다, 입증하다)
  16. Once a time. upon ([전] ~ 위에)
  17. Can you solve this ? riddle ([명] 수수께끼)
  18. She had a long . career ([명] 직업, 경력)
  19. The tells the story. narrator ([명] 서술자)
  20. I like food. local ([형] 지역의, 현지의)
  21. I feel today. uneasy ([형] 불안한, 불편한)
  22. I did ink. use up (~을 다 쓰다)
  23. Protect our green . environment ([명] 자연환경)
  24. "Rain cats and dogs" is an . idiom ([명] 관용구, 숙어)
DAY 41
반의어 고르기Choose the Antonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. mount ([동] 오르다, 올라타다)
    ① uneasy② environment③ descend④ local
  2. champion ([명] 우승자)
    ① launch② mount③ loser④ riddle
  3. launch ([동] 시작하다, 발사하다)
    ① account for② suffer③ uneasy④ stop
  4. local ([형] 지역의, 현지의)
    ① account for② script③ foreign④ uneasy
  5. upon ([전] ~ 위에)
    ① champion② demonstrate③ supper④ under
  6. uneasy ([형] 불안한, 불편한)
    ① bet② calm③ use up④ upon
  7. difficulty ([명] 어려움)
    ① distance② riddle③ ease④ demonstrate
DAY 41
동의어 고르기Choose the Synonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 동의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. launch ([동] 시작하다, 발사하다)
    ① stroke② idiom③ environment④ start
  2. demonstrate ([동] 보여주다, 입증하다)
    ① difficulty② script③ supper④ show
  3. suffer ([동] 고통받다)
    ① feel pain② environment③ supper④ narrator
  4. upon ([전] ~ 위에)
    ① mount② on③ riddle④ launch
  5. riddle ([명] 수수께끼)
    ① mount② launch③ string④ puzzle
  6. make a decision (결정하다)
    ① uneasy② decide③ career④ champion
  7. champion ([명] 우승자)
    ① launch② riddle③ supper④ winner
  8. career ([명] 직업, 경력)
    ① job② supper③ environment④ string
  9. account for (설명하다)
    ① suffer② supper③ use up④ explain
  10. difficulty ([명] 어려움)
    ① trouble② string③ uneasy④ supper
  11. stroke ([명] 타격, 뇌졸중)
    ① difficulty② distance③ hit④ make a decision
  12. mount ([동] 오르다, 올라타다)
    ① career② champion③ riddle④ climb
  13. supper ([명] 간단한 저녁 식사)
    ① suffer② uneasy③ dinner④ mount
  14. indicate ([동] 나타내다, 가리키다)
    ① narrator② make a decision③ suffer④ show
  15. environment ([명] 자연환경)
    ① nature② difficulty③ string④ narrator
  16. string ([명] 끈, 줄)
    ① idiom② line③ riddle④ launch
  17. uneasy ([형] 불안한, 불편한)
    ① demonstrate② difficulty③ nervous④ script
DAY 42
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 favor [명] 호의, 부탁 Can you do a favor? - -
2 individual [형] 개인의 Each individual is important. group personal
3 serve [동] 음식을 차려 주다 Serve the cake now. - give
4 bit [부] 조금, 약간 It is a bit cold. - a little
5 route [명] 길, 경로 Take the shortest route. - way
6 portrait [명] 초상화 Look at the king's portrait. - -
7 vary [동] 서로 다르다 The colors vary a lot. stay change
8 slave [명] 노예 The slave worked hard. master -
9 treat [동] 대하다, 대접하다 Treat others with kindness. - deal with
10 classic [형] 고전적인 This is a classic movie. modern -
11 relative [명] 친척 My relative lives here. - -
12 account [명] 계좌, 설명 Open a bank account. - -
13 collaborate [동] 협력하다 Let's collaborate on art. - work together
14 expert [명] 전문가 He is an expert cook. beginner master
15 complain [동] 불평하다 Do not complain about food. - -
16 situation [명] 상황 The situation is good. - -
17 within [전] ~ 이내에 Finish it within one hour. outside inside
18 maximum [형] 최대의 The maximum speed is 50. minimum most
19 crowded [형] 붐비는 The bus is very crowded. empty busy
20 bounce [동] 튀다 The ball did bounce high. - jump
21 technique [명] 기법, 기술 Use a new technique. - skill
22 be about to 막 ~하려고 하다 I am about to go. - -
23 most of all 무엇보다도 Most of all, be happy. - first of all
24 give a hand ~을 도와주다 Can you give a hand? - help

DAY 43
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 sneeze [동] 재채기하다 The dust made me sneeze. - -
2 disadvantage [명] 불리한 점, 약점 Small size is a disadvantage. advantage weakness
3 filter [명] 필터 [동] 거르다 Use a water filter. - cleaner
4 exist [동] 존재하다 Do aliens exist? die live
5 positive [형] 긍정적인 Have a positive mind. negative bright
6 vivid [형] 생생한, 선명한 I have a vivid dream. dull clear
7 rubber [명] 고무 The ball is made of rubber. - -
8 material [명] 재료, 물질 We need material for the house. - stuff
9 virtual [형] 가상의 I like virtual games. real -
10 harm [명] 해 [동] 해치다 Do not harm the trees. help hurt
11 minimum [형] 최소의 The minimum age is ten. maximum least
12 opposite [형] 반대의 Black is opposite to white. same different
13 description [명] 설명, 묘사 Read the product description. - explanation
14 bunch [명] 다발, 송이 I bought a bunch of grapes. - group
15 since [접] ~한 이래로, ~이므로 I am happy since you came. - because
16 amazing [형] 놀라운 Your drawing is amazing. boring wonderful
17 communicate [동] 의사소통하다 We communicate with words. - talk
18 interpret [동] 해석하다, 통역하다 Can you interpret this song? - explain
19 lid [명] 뚜껑 Open the lid of the jar. - cover
20 oppose [동] 반대하다 I oppose the bad plan. agree against
21 slight [형] 약간의 I have a slight cold. large small
22 in case of ~의 경우에 In case of rain, stay. - if
23 on one's own 스스로, 혼자 힘으로 I did it on my own. together alone
24 take a tour 둘러보다 Let's take a tour now. - travel

18 champion [명] 우승자
19 [동] 보여주다, 입증하다 demonstrate
20 indicate [동] 나타내다, 가리키다
21 [명] 대본 script
22 launch [동] 시작하다, 발사하다
23 bet [동] 돈을 걸다
24 [전] ~ 위에 upon

20 [동] 음식을 차려 주다 serve

DAY 43
예문 빈칸 채우기Fill in the Blank
학습한 날짜 :

뜻을 참고하여 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 단어 은행에서 골라 쓰세요.

existopposefilterpositiverubbervividoppositeamazinglidin case ofsneezebunchdisadvantageharmdescriptionvirtualsincecommunicatetake a tourmaterialminimumslighton one's owninterpret
  1. I have a dream. vivid ([형] 생생한, 선명한)
  2. Open the of the jar. lid ([명] 뚜껑)
  3. Do not the trees. harm ([명] 해 [동] 해치다)
  4. Read the product . description ([명] 설명, 묘사)
  5. I have a cold. slight ([형] 약간의)
  6. Use a water . filter ([명] 필터 [동] 거르다)
  7. Can you this song? interpret ([동] 해석하다, 통역하다)
  8. The age is ten. minimum ([형] 최소의)
  9. Small size is a . disadvantage ([명] 불리한 점, 약점)
  10. We need for the house. material ([명] 재료, 물질)
  11. The ball is made of . rubber ([명] 고무)
  12. rain, stay. in case of (~의 경우에)
  13. Have a mind. positive ([형] 긍정적인)
  14. I the bad plan. oppose ([동] 반대하다)
  15. The dust made me . sneeze ([동] 재채기하다)
  16. I like games. virtual ([형] 가상의)
  17. Let's now. take a tour (둘러보다)
  18. I am happy you came. since ([접] ~한 이래로, ~이므로)
  19. I did it on my own. ( ) on one's own (스스로, 혼자 힘으로)
  20. Black is to white. opposite ([형] 반대의)
  21. I bought a of grapes. bunch ([명] 다발, 송이)
  22. Your drawing is . amazing ([형] 놀라운)
  23. We with words. communicate ([동] 의사소통하다)
  24. Do aliens ? exist ([동] 존재하다)
DAY 43
반의어 고르기Choose the Antonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. exist ([동] 존재하다)
    ① die② amazing③ vivid④ virtual
  2. slight ([형] 약간의)
    ① in case of② large③ exist④ positive
  3. disadvantage ([명] 불리한 점, 약점)
    ① virtual② take a tour③ advantage④ exist
  4. amazing ([형] 놀라운)
    ① material② boring③ virtual④ minimum
  5. minimum ([형] 최소의)
    ① oppose② harm③ communicate④ maximum
  6. opposite ([형] 반대의)
    ① same② minimum③ positive④ virtual
  7. harm ([명] 해 [동] 해치다)
    ① communicate② help③ slight④ positive
  8. virtual ([형] 가상의)
    ① filter② sneeze③ real④ description
  9. on one's own (스스로, 혼자 힘으로)
    ① together② in case of③ disadvantage④ filter
  10. positive ([형] 긍정적인)
    ① interpret② disadvantage③ virtual④ negative
  11. oppose ([동] 반대하다)
    ① on one's own② agree③ slight④ minimum
  12. vivid ([형] 생생한, 선명한)
    ① positive② harm③ dull④ communicate
DAY 43
동의어 고르기Choose the Synonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 동의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. amazing ([형] 놀라운)
    ① material② wonderful③ on one's own④ vivid
  2. description ([명] 설명, 묘사)
    ① communicate② oppose③ explanation④ sneeze
  3. slight ([형] 약간의)
    ① small② vivid③ description④ lid
  4. lid ([명] 뚜껑)
    ① cover② amazing③ rubber④ slight
  5. filter ([명] 필터 [동] 거르다)
    ① rubber② take a tour③ cleaner④ slight
  6. oppose ([동] 반대하다)
    ① harm② minimum③ disadvantage④ against
  7. take a tour (둘러보다)
    ① since② minimum③ exist④ travel
  8. exist ([동] 존재하다)
    ① minimum② live③ positive④ harm
  9. interpret ([동] 해석하다, 통역하다)
    ① explain② rubber③ exist④ oppose
  10. since ([접] ~한 이래로, ~이므로)
    ① because② communicate③ on one's own④ positive
  11. on one's own (스스로, 혼자 힘으로)
    ① harm② bunch③ sneeze④ alone
  12. positive ([형] 긍정적인)
    ① bright② interpret③ slight④ description
  13. bunch ([명] 다발, 송이)
    ① disadvantage② group③ exist④ material
  14. in case of (~의 경우에)
    ① if② virtual③ oppose④ vivid
  15. material ([명] 재료, 물질)
    ① vivid② sneeze③ oppose④ stuff
  16. disadvantage ([명] 불리한 점, 약점)
    ① opposite② weakness③ interpret④ bunch
  17. harm ([명] 해 [동] 해치다)
    ① sneeze② hurt③ material④ bunch
  18. opposite ([형] 반대의)
    ① slight② bunch③ different④ description
  19. minimum ([형] 최소의)
    ① sneeze② bunch③ filter④ least
  20. vivid ([형] 생생한, 선명한)
    ① clear② on one's own③ lid④ filter
  21. communicate ([동] 의사소통하다)
    ① vivid② bunch③ talk④ interpret
DAY 44
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 twisted [형] 꼬인, 뒤틀린 The wire is twisted. straight bent
2 survey [명] 설문 조사 Fill out this survey. - study
3 respond [동] 대답하다, 반응하다 Please respond to my call. ask answer
4 environmental [형] 환경의 Pollution is an environmental problem. - natural
5 truly [부] 정말로 I truly love you. - really
6 independence [명] 독립 Korea won its independence. - freedom
7 suggest [동] 제안하다 I suggest we go home. - advise
8 cheat [동] 부정행위를 하다 Do not cheat on tests. - lie
9 achieve [동] 성취하다 Achieve your big dream. lose get
10 arrest [동] 체포하다 Police arrest the bad man. free catch
11 extreme [형] 극도의 The heat is extreme today. mild very great
12 reduce [동] 줄이다 Reduce the use of paper. increase cut
13 feature [명] 특징 This phone has a new feature. - character
14 knit [동] 뜨개질하다 My mom can knit hats. - -
15 whenever [접] ~할 때마다 Come whenever you want. - every time
16 unexpected [형] 예기치 않은 I got an unexpected gift. expected sudden
17 chain [명] 사슬, 체인 Tie it with a chain. - -
18 former [형] 이전의 He is a former teacher. later past
19 movement [명] 동작, 움직임 Watch the dancer's movement. - move
20 artificial [형] 인공의 These are artificial flowers. natural fake
21 whether [접] ~인지 아닌지 I wonder whether it rains. - if
22 hold out 버티다, 저항하다 Can you hold out longer? - wait
23 pass away 사망하다 My dog did pass away. live die
24 be sure to 꼭 ~하다 Be sure to wash hands. - must

DAY 45
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 option [명] 선택권 You have a good option. - choice
2 personality [명] 성격 She has a kind personality. - character
3 suppose [동] 생각하다, 가정하다 I suppose you are right. - think
4 decorate [동] 장식하다 Decorate the Christmas tree. - adorn
5 medal [명] 메달 He won a gold medal. - -
6 strip [동] 벗기다 [명] 가느다란 조각 Cut the paper into a strip. - peel
7 priest [명] 성직자, 신부 The priest is in church. - -
8 survive [동] 살아남다 Animals survive in the cold. die live on
9 ashamed [형] 부끄러워하는 I feel ashamed of myself. proud sorry
10 behave [동] 행동하다 Please behave in school. - act
11 competition [명] 경쟁, 대회 I won the art competition. - race
12 graduate [동] 졸업하다 I graduate from school today. start finish
13 background [명] 배경 Look at the photo background. - -
14 stripe [명] 줄무늬 Zebras have black stripe. - line
15 increase [동] 증가하다 The price will increase soon. decrease grow
16 suspect [동] 의심하다 I suspect he is lying. trust doubt
17 scratch [동] 긁다 Do not scratch your skin. - -
18 slightly [부] 약간 The door is slightly open. a lot a little
19 require [동] 필요로 하다 Plants require sun and water. - need
20 deny [동] 부인하다 He did deny the truth. accept refuse
21 indeed [부] 정말로 It is indeed very hot. - really
22 put together 조립하다 Put together the toy car. break build
23 on the other hand 반면에 Rain is wet, on the other hand. - but
24 think to oneself 마음속으로 생각하다 I think to myself silently. - -
DAY 45
쓰기 연습Write & Remember
학습한 날짜 :

뜻과 단어를 확인하고, 오른쪽 줄에 영어 단어를 3번 따라 쓰세요. 따라 쓸 때는 반드시 큰 소리로 단어를 읽으세요.

No.단어뜻3번 쓰기
1 increase [동] 증가하다
2 graduate [동] 졸업하다
3 ashamed [형] 부끄러워하는
4 competition [명] 경쟁, 대회
5 slightly [부] 약간
6 think to oneself 마음속으로 생각하다
7 strip [동] 벗기다 [명] 가느다란 조각
8 personality [명] 성격
9 background [명] 배경
10 suspect [동] 의심하다
11 medal [명] 메달
12 deny [동] 부인하다
13 on the other hand 반면에
14 scratch [동] 긁다
15 behave [동] 행동하다
16 stripe [명] 줄무늬
17 put together 조립하다
18 priest [명] 성직자, 신부
19 indeed [부] 정말로
20 decorate [동] 장식하다
21 option [명] 선택권
22 require [동] 필요로 하다
23 survive [동] 살아남다
24 suppose [동] 생각하다, 가정하다

3 oppose [동] 반대하다

5 slight [형] 약간의
6 ~의 경우에 in case of
7 [동] 해석하다, 통역하다 interpret
8 exist [동] 존재하다
9 harm [명] 해 [동] 해치다
10 positive [형] 긍정적인
11 [동] 의사소통하다 communicate
12 minimum [형] 최소의
13 virtual [형] 가상의
14 opposite [형] 반대의
15 sneeze [동] 재채기하다
16 description [명] 설명, 묘사
17 둘러보다 take a tour
18 lid [명] 뚜껑
19 filter [명] 필터 [동] 거르다
20 amazing [형] 놀라운
21 [접] ~한 이래로, ~이므로 since
22 [형] 생생한, 선명한 vivid
23 [명] 고무 rubber
24 [명] 불리한 점, 약점 disadvantage

4 [형] 극도의 extreme
5 [형] 환경의 environmental
6 [명] 특징 feature

21 [동] 대답하다, 반응하다 respond

24 [동] 성취하다 achieve
DAY 45

학습한 날짜 :

뜻을 참고하여 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 단어 은행에서 골라 쓰세요.

behaveindeedsurvivesuspectpriestsupposeoptionput togethercompetitiondecorateon the other handpersonalitystripemedaldenygraduateincreaseashamedscratchslightlyrequirethink to oneselfstripbackground
  1. I feel of myself. ashamed ([형] 부끄러워하는)
  2. I won the art . competition ([명] 경쟁, 대회)
  3. the Christmas tree. decorate ([동] 장식하다)
  4. It is very hot. indeed ([부] 정말로)
  5. Plants sun and water. require ([동] 필요로 하다)
  6. I think to myself silently. ( ) think to oneself (마음속으로 생각하다)
  7. The price will soon. increase ([동] 증가하다)
  8. You have a good . option ([명] 선택권)
  9. I you are right. suppose ([동] 생각하다, 가정하다)
  10. Cut the paper into a . strip ([동] 벗기다 [명] 가느다란 조각)
  11. The is in church. priest ([명] 성직자, 신부)
  12. He won a gold . medal ([명] 메달)
  13. I from school today. graduate ([동] 졸업하다)
  14. She has a kind . personality ([명] 성격)
  15. I he is lying. suspect ([동] 의심하다)
  16. He did the truth. deny ([동] 부인하다)
  17. Zebras have black . stripe ([명] 줄무늬)
  18. Look at the photo . background ([명] 배경)
  19. Rain is wet, . on the other hand (반면에)
  20. The door is open. slightly ([부] 약간)
  21. Please in school. behave ([동] 행동하다)
  22. Do not your skin. scratch ([동] 긁다)
  23. the toy car. put together (조립하다)
  24. Animals in the cold. survive ([동] 살아남다)

DAY 46
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 source [명] 원천, 근원 Water is the source of life. - origin
2 convince [동] 확신시키다 He did convince me to go. - persuade
3 direction [명] 방향, 지시 Walk in the right direction. - way
4 emphasize [동] 강조하다 Teachers emphasize reading. - stress
5 inner [형] 안의, 내면의 I found my inner peace. outer inside
6 official [형] 공식적인 This is the official rule. - formal
7 pressure [명] 압박, 압력 Blood pressure is high. - force
8 realistic [형] 현실적인 Give me a realistic goal. ideal real
9 satisfied [형] 만족하는 I am satisfied with the food. unhappy happy
10 term [명] 용어, 기간 I don't know this legal term. - word
11 valuable [형] 가치 있는 Time is very valuable. cheap precious
12 wander [동] 돌아다니다 Do not wander in the dark. stay roam
13 agency [명] 대리점, 기관 Call the travel agency. - office
14 character [명] 성격, 등장인물 He is a funny character. - personality
15 complex [형] 복잡한 This math is very complex. simple complicated
16 delight [명] 기쁨 To my delight, she smiled. sorrow joy
17 entire [형] 전체의 I ate the entire cake. part whole
18 frequent [형] 빈번한 Rain is frequent in July. rare common
19 intelligent [형] 똑똑한 Dolphins are intelligent. foolish smart
20 mission [명] 임무 The space mission was a success. - task
21 ordinary [형] 보통의 It was an ordinary day. special normal
22 focus on ~에 집중하다 Focus on your study. - concentrate on
23 get along with ~와 잘 지내다 I get along with Sam. - -
24 in the long run 결국에는 It will help in the long run. - finally

11 character [명] 성격, 등장인물
12 get along with ~와 잘 지내다
13 in the long run 결국에는
14 source [명] 원천, 근원
15 delight [명] 기쁨
16 intelligent [형] 똑똑한
17 satisfied [형] 만족하는
18 entire [형] 전체의
19 focus on ~에 집중하다
20 pressure [명] 압박, 압력
21 mission [명] 임무
22 agency [명] 대리점, 기관
23 emphasize [동] 강조하다
24 direction [명] 방향, 지시

agencysatisfiedordinaryin the long runpressureintelligentwanderdelightmissionfrequentcharacterinnerdirectionentireconvincefocus onemphasizerealistictermget along withcomplexofficialsourcevaluable

DAY 47
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 admire [동] 존경하다 I admire his courage. hate respect
2 benefit [명] 이익, 혜택 Exercise has many benefits. loss gain
3 conflict [명] 갈등, 충돌 Stop the family conflict. peace fight
4 depend [동] 의존하다 Birds depend on trees. - rely
5 equal [형] 같은, 평등한 All men are equal. different same
6 gesture [명] 몸짓 He made a big gesture. - sign
7 internal [형] 내부의 Drink for internal health. external inside
8 modern [형] 현대의 Look at the modern building. old new
9 patient [형] 인내심 있는 [명] 환자 Be patient with children. impatient -
10 recognize [동] 알아보다 I did recognize her face. - know
11 sensitive [형] 민감한 My skin is very sensitive. blunt -
12 theme [명] 주제 The theme is love. - topic
13 variety [명] 다양성 I like a variety of food. - diversity
14 witness [명] 목격자 The witness saw the car. - -
15 amazing [형] 놀라운 Your song is amazing. - surprising
16 ceremony [명] 의식 Go to the wedding ceremony. - rite
17 contribute [동] 기여하다 Contribute some money. - give
18 distribute [동] 배포하다 Distribute the papers. - give out
19 escape [동] 탈출하다 The lion did escape. - run away
20 global [형] 세계적인 Global warming is serious. local world
21 investigate [동] 조사하다 Police investigate the case. - examine
22 look forward to ~을 고대하다 I look forward to summer. - -
23 make use of ~을 이용하다 Make use of old bottles. - use
24 on purpose 고의로 You did it on purpose. by accident intentionally
DAY 47
쓰기 연습Write & Remember
학습한 날짜 :

뜻과 단어를 확인하고, 오른쪽 줄에 영어 단어를 3번 따라 쓰세요. 따라 쓸 때는 반드시 큰 소리로 단어를 읽으세요.

No.단어뜻3번 쓰기
1 on purpose 고의로
2 depend [동] 의존하다
3 theme [명] 주제
4 investigate [동] 조사하다
5 conflict [명] 갈등, 충돌
6 recognize [동] 알아보다
7 internal [형] 내부의
8 global [형] 세계적인
9 equal [형] 같은, 평등한
10 make use of ~을 이용하다
11 distribute [동] 배포하다
12 benefit [명] 이익, 혜택
13 witness [명] 목격자
14 ceremony [명] 의식
15 admire [동] 존경하다
16 look forward to ~을 고대하다
17 variety [명] 다양성
18 escape [동] 탈출하다
19 gesture [명] 몸짓
20 contribute [동] 기여하다
21 modern [형] 현대의
22 amazing [형] 놀라운
23 patient [형] 인내심 있는 [명] 환자
24 sensitive [형] 민감한
DAY 47
누적 복습 시험 · DAY 45Review Test
학습한 날짜 :

단어는 뜻을, 뜻은 단어를 쓰세요.

1 option [명] 선택권
2 ashamed [형] 부끄러워하는
3 마음속으로 생각하다 think to oneself
4 [동] 필요로 하다 require
5 [동] 행동하다 behave
6 [동] 생각하다, 가정하다 suppose
7 suspect [동] 의심하다
8 [명] 줄무늬 stripe
9 [동] 졸업하다 graduate
10 반면에 on the other hand
11 put together 조립하다
12 [동] 장식하다 decorate
13 indeed [부] 정말로
14 [명] 메달 medal
15 [동] 긁다 scratch
16 [동] 벗기다 [명] 가느다란 조각 strip
17 priest [명] 성직자, 신부
18 increase [동] 증가하다
19 personality [명] 성격
20 [명] 경쟁, 대회 competition
21 slightly [부] 약간
22 [동] 살아남다 survive
23 [명] 배경 background
24 deny [동] 부인하다
DAY 47
누적 복습 시험 · DAY 46Review Test
학습한 날짜 :

단어는 뜻을, 뜻은 단어를 쓰세요.

1 wander [동] 돌아다니다
2 focus on ~에 집중하다
3 [형] 만족하는 satisfied
4 [명] 기쁨 delight
5 [형] 복잡한 complex
6 [동] 강조하다 emphasize
7 [명] 방향, 지시 direction
8 valuable [형] 가치 있는
9 [명] 대리점, 기관 agency
10 inner [형] 안의, 내면의
11 [형] 공식적인 official
12 mission [명] 임무
13 [동] 확신시키다 convince
14 frequent [형] 빈번한
15 [명] 용어, 기간 term
16 [형] 현실적인 realistic
17 [형] 보통의 ordinary
18 intelligent [형] 똑똑한
19 [명] 원천, 근원 source
20 [명] 압박, 압력 pressure
21 in the long run 결국에는
22 [형] 전체의 entire
23 character [명] 성격, 등장인물
24 get along with ~와 잘 지내다
DAY 47
예문 빈칸 채우기Fill in the Blank
학습한 날짜 :

뜻을 참고하여 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 단어 은행에서 골라 쓰세요.

recognizebenefitceremonymake use ofglobalvarietygesturelook forward tocontributesensitiveequalescapeadmirethemeinternalamazingconflicton purposemoderndistributeinvestigatewitnessdependpatient
  1. I did her face. recognize ([동] 알아보다)
  2. He made a big . gesture ([명] 몸짓)
  3. I his courage. admire ([동] 존경하다)
  4. Stop the family . conflict ([명] 갈등, 충돌)
  5. Be with children. patient ([형] 인내심 있는 [명] 환자)
  6. All men are . equal ([형] 같은, 평등한)
  7. The lion did . escape ([동] 탈출하다)
  8. Look at the building. modern ([형] 현대의)
  9. Go to the wedding . ceremony ([명] 의식)
  10. Police the case. investigate ([동] 조사하다)
  11. Your song is . amazing ([형] 놀라운)
  12. My skin is very . sensitive ([형] 민감한)
  13. You did it . on purpose (고의로)
  14. I summer. look forward to (~을 고대하다)
  15. The saw the car. witness ([명] 목격자)
  16. the papers. distribute ([동] 배포하다)
  17. old bottles. make use of (~을 이용하다)
  18. Birds on trees. depend ([동] 의존하다)
  19. some money. contribute ([동] 기여하다)
  20. The is love. theme ([명] 주제)
  21. I like a of food. variety ([명] 다양성)
  22. Drink for health. internal ([형] 내부의)
  23. warming is serious. global ([형] 세계적인)
  24. Exercise has many s. benefit ([명] 이익, 혜택)
DAY 47
반의어 고르기Choose the Antonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. internal ([형] 내부의)
    ① external② equal③ escape④ admire
  2. admire ([동] 존경하다)
    ① witness② conflict③ distribute④ hate
  3. patient ([형] 인내심 있는 [명] 환자)
    ① look forward to② internal③ conflict④ impatient
  4. modern ([형] 현대의)
    ① global② conflict③ benefit④ old
  5. benefit ([명] 이익, 혜택)
    ① loss② depend③ contribute④ make use of
  6. equal ([형] 같은, 평등한)
    ① sensitive② global③ look forward to④ different
  7. on purpose (고의로)
    ① escape② admire③ sensitive④ by accident
  8. sensitive ([형] 민감한)
    ① blunt② ceremony③ distribute④ admire
  9. global ([형] 세계적인)
    ① variety② patient③ amazing④ local
  10. conflict ([명] 갈등, 충돌)
    ① patient② depend③ modern④ peace
DAY 47
동의어 고르기Choose the Synonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 동의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. theme ([명] 주제)
    ① contribute② look forward to③ topic④ distribute
  2. contribute ([동] 기여하다)
    ① modern② amazing③ witness④ give
  3. recognize ([동] 알아보다)
    ① benefit② on purpose③ theme④ know
  4. admire ([동] 존경하다)
    ① witness② make use of③ respect④ patient
  5. benefit ([명] 이익, 혜택)
    ① global② gain③ on purpose④ witness
  6. equal ([형] 같은, 평등한)
    ① escape② theme③ same④ investigate
  7. variety ([명] 다양성)
    ① internal② diversity③ distribute④ global
  8. investigate ([동] 조사하다)
    ① examine② patient③ sensitive④ depend
  9. global ([형] 세계적인)
    ① conflict② distribute③ world④ investigate
  10. internal ([형] 내부의)
    ① witness② admire③ inside④ theme
  11. on purpose (고의로)
    ① ceremony② intentionally③ gesture④ modern
  12. gesture ([명] 몸짓)
    ① sign② patient③ escape④ recognize
  13. modern ([형] 현대의)
    ① conflict② contribute③ theme④ new
  14. distribute ([동] 배포하다)
    ① give out② variety③ escape④ global
  15. amazing ([형] 놀라운)
    ① surprising② theme③ make use of④ depend
  16. conflict ([명] 갈등, 충돌)
    ① benefit② fight③ distribute④ equal
  17. ceremony ([명] 의식)
    ① investigate② witness③ distribute④ rite
  18. escape ([동] 탈출하다)
    ① witness② recognize③ run away④ distribute
  19. depend ([동] 의존하다)
    ① amazing② sensitive③ escape④ rely
  20. make use of (~을 이용하다)
    ① variety② theme③ admire④ use
DAY 48
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 admit [동] 인정하다 He did admit his fault. deny accept
2 beyond [전] ~ 저편에 Look beyond the river. - over
3 consider [동] 고려하다 Consider my offer. - think
4 describe [동] 묘사하다 Describe your teacher. - explain
5 evidence [명] 증거 Is there any evidence? - proof
6 goal [명] 목표 My goal is to be a doctor. - aim
7 international [형] 국제적인 Join the international club. local global
8 moral [형] 도덕적인 He is a moral person. - right
9 perform [동] 공연하다, 수행하다 Perform the play on stage. - play
10 relate [동] 관련시키다 I can relate to you. - connect
11 severe [형] 엄격한, 심한 The storm was severe. mild serious
12 theory [명] 이론 This is a scientific theory. practice -
13 vast [형] 방대한 The desert is vast. small huge
14 worth [형] 가치가 있는 It is worth buying. - valuable
15 annual [형] 매년의 The annual festival is here. - yearly
16 communicate [동] 소통하다 Use phone to communicate. - talk
17 create [동] 창조하다 Create a new song. destroy make
18 domestic [형] 국내의, 가정의 I like domestic cars. foreign local
19 establish [동] 설립하다 They establish a school. - set up
20 identify [동] 확인하다 Identify the robber. - find
21 literature [명] 문학 I study English literature. - -
22 pay attention to ~에 주의를 기울이다 Pay attention to me. - listen to
23 run out of ~을 다 써버리다 We run out of water. - -
24 take place 개최되다, 일어나다 The party will take place. - happen

DAY 48
예문 빈칸 채우기Fill in the Blank
학습한 날짜 :

뜻을 참고하여 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 단어 은행에서 골라 쓰세요.

considerliteratureidentifyadmitseveretake placeestablishannualgoalworthdomesticcreatecommunicateperformevidencetheorydescribemoralvastrelatebeyondinternationalpay attention torun out of
  1. The desert is . vast ([형] 방대한)
  2. Use phone to . communicate ([동] 소통하다)
  3. We water. run out of (~을 다 써버리다)
  4. He is a person. moral ([형] 도덕적인)
  5. my offer. consider ([동] 고려하다)
  6. Join the club. international ([형] 국제적인)
  7. the robber. identify ([동] 확인하다)
  8. They a school. establish ([동] 설립하다)
  9. The storm was . severe ([형] 엄격한, 심한)
  10. It is buying. worth ([형] 가치가 있는)
  11. I like cars. domestic ([형] 국내의, 가정의)
  12. My is to be a doctor. goal ([명] 목표)
  13. Look the river. beyond ([전] ~ 저편에)
  14. The festival is here. annual ([형] 매년의)
  15. a new song. create ([동] 창조하다)
  16. He did his fault. admit ([동] 인정하다)
  17. I can to you. relate ([동] 관련시키다)
  18. I study English . literature ([명] 문학)
  19. The party will . take place (개최되다, 일어나다)
  20. This is a scientific . theory ([명] 이론)
  21. your teacher. describe ([동] 묘사하다)
  22. the play on stage. perform ([동] 공연하다, 수행하다)
  23. Is there any ? evidence ([명] 증거)
  24. me. pay attention to (~에 주의를 기울이다)
DAY 48
반의어 고르기Choose the Antonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 반의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. vast ([형] 방대한)
    ① perform② beyond③ small④ communicate
  2. create ([동] 창조하다)
    ① destroy② describe③ theory④ pay attention to
  3. severe ([형] 엄격한, 심한)
    ① international② worth③ take place④ mild
  4. theory ([명] 이론)
    ① beyond② consider③ practice④ annual
  5. international ([형] 국제적인)
    ① local② communicate③ create④ worth
  6. domestic ([형] 국내의, 가정의)
    ① establish② perform③ foreign④ identify

DAY 48
동의어 고르기Choose the Synonym
학습한 날짜 :

각 단어의 동의어를 보기에서 고르세요.

  1. take place (개최되다, 일어나다)
    ① create② happen③ identify④ literature
  2. worth ([형] 가치가 있는)
    ① perform② literature③ describe④ valuable
  3. communicate ([동] 소통하다)
    ① admit② talk③ consider④ annual
  4. severe ([형] 엄격한, 심한)
    ① take place② literature③ serious④ evidence
  5. relate ([동] 관련시키다)
    ① goal② run out of③ connect④ identify
  6. beyond ([전] ~ 저편에)
    ① severe② literature③ over④ pay attention to
  7. admit ([동] 인정하다)
    ① perform② severe③ goal④ accept
  8. international ([형] 국제적인)
    ① theory② describe③ global④ pay attention to
  9. evidence ([명] 증거)
    ① beyond② proof③ relate④ establish
  10. describe ([동] 묘사하다)
    ① identify② severe③ explain④ vast
  11. vast ([형] 방대한)
    ① establish② huge③ evidence④ international
  12. goal ([명] 목표)
    ① international② beyond③ aim④ annual
  13. domestic ([형] 국내의, 가정의)
    ① beyond② establish③ local④ run out of
  14. consider ([동] 고려하다)
    ① establish② vast③ think④ beyond
  15. identify ([동] 확인하다)
    ① communicate② relate③ take place④ find
  16. moral ([형] 도덕적인)
    ① beyond② annual③ right④ literature
  17. annual ([형] 매년의)
    ① beyond② yearly③ admit④ describe
  18. perform ([동] 공연하다, 수행하다)
    ① pay attention to② relate③ play④ identify
  19. establish ([동] 설립하다)
    ① run out of② set up③ perform④ admit
  20. pay attention to (~에 주의를 기울이다)
    ① listen to② describe③ run out of④ evidence
  21. create ([동] 창조하다)
    ① make② run out of③ perform④ relate
DAY 49
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 waterproof [형] 방수의 I need a waterproof watch. - water-tight
2 underground [형] 지하의 Rats live in underground holes. aboveground below ground
3 risk [명] 위험(성) Skating on ice has a risk. safety danger
4 amusement [명] 즐거움, 재미 We go to the amusement park. boredom fun
5 clerk [명] 직원, 점원 Ask the bank clerk for help. - worker
6 encourage [동] 격려하다 Teachers encourage us to study. discourage support
7 harvest [명] 수확 [동] 수확하다 Autumn is the harvest time. - crop
8 behavior [명] 행동, 처신 He has good behavior at school. - action
9 embarrass [동] 당황하게 만들다 Do not embarrass your friend. - upset
10 observe [동] 관찰하다 I observe the small bugs. ignore watch
11 sightseeing [명] 관광 We did sightseeing in Seoul. - tour
12 transport [동] 수송하다 Trucks transport heavy goods. - carry
13 suit [명] 정장 [동] 어울리다 That blue shirt suits you. - fit
14 participate [동] 참가하다 I participate in the race. quit join
15 faucet [명] 수도꼭지 Turn off the water faucet. - tap
16 mysterious [형] 신비한 The dark cave looks mysterious. common strange
17 mud [명] 진흙 Pigs like to roll in mud. - dirt
18 structure [명] 구조, 건물 Look at the bridge structure. - building
19 hatch [동] 부화하다 The baby birds did hatch. - -
20 grand [형] 웅장한, 큰 The castle has a grand hall. small great
21 assist [동] 돕다 I assist my mom today. - help

DAY 50
단어 목록Word List
학습한 날짜 :
No.단어의미예문반의어동의어
1 optimist [명] 낙천주의자 An optimist always feels happy. pessimist -
2 consider [동] 고려하다 Consider my new idea, please. - think
3 nest [명] 둥지 The bird built a nest. - home
4 sincere [형] 진심 어린 He gave a sincere apology. fake honest
5 feast [명] 잔치 We had a grand feast. - party
6 dew [명] 이슬 Morning dew is on grass. - -
7 persuade [동] 설득하다 I persuade him to go. - convince
8 operator [명] 기사, 조작자 The machine operator is busy. - driver
9 temperature [명] 온도, 기온 The temperature is very high. - heat
10 motivate [동] 동기를 부여하다 Music motivates me to dance. - encourage
11 function [명] 기능 [동] 작동하다 This phone has many functions. - work
12 paralyze [동] 마비시키다 The cold did paralyze him. - stop
13 construction [명] 건설, 공사 Road construction is slow today. - building
14 revolution [명] 혁명 Digital revolution changed our life. - change
15 hurricane [명] 허리케인 A strong hurricane is coming. - storm
16 experiment [명] 실험 [동] 실험하다 We did a science experiment. - test
17 performance [명] 공연, 성과 The dance performance was great. - show
18 spaceship [명] 우주선 The spaceship landed on Moon. - -
19 surprisingly [부] 놀랍게도 Surprisingly, the cat can swim. - -
20 arrange [동] 정리하다 Arrange the books on shelf. mess up set
21 glance [동] 흘낏 보다 Take a quick glance here. stare look
22 bring back 되돌려 주다 Bring back my pencil, please. take away return
23 a variety of 다양한 We have a variety of toys. - many kinds of
24 put in danger 위험에 빠뜨리다 Do not put birds in danger. - -
